search_text: A Bio-inspired Modular System for Humanoid Posture Control 用于人形姿势控制的仿生模块化系统 Bio-inspired sensorimotor control systems may be appealing to roboticists who try to solve problems of multiDOF humanoids and human-robot interactions. This paper presents a simple posture control concept from neuroscience, called disturbance estimation and compensation, DEC concept [1]. It provides human-like mechanical compliance due to low loop gain, tolerance of time delays, and automatic adjustment to changes in external disturbance scenarios. Its outstanding feature is that it uses feedback of multisensory disturbance estimates rather than 'raw' sensory signals for disturbance compensation. After proof-of-principle tests in 1 and 2 DOF posture control robots, we present here a generalized DEC control module for multi-DOF robots. In the control layout, one DEC module controls one DOF (modular control architecture). Modules of neighboring joints are synergistically interconnected using vestibular information in combination with joint angle and torque signals. These sensory interconnections allow each module to control the kinematics of the more distal links as if they were a single link. This modular design makes the complexity of the robot control scale linearly with the DOFs and error robustness high compared to monolithic control architectures. The presented concept uses Matlab/Simulink (The MathWorks, Natick, USA) for both, model simulation and robot control and will be available as open library 仿生感觉运动控制系统可能会吸引那些试图解决多自由度类人机器人和人机交互问题的机器人专家。本文提出了一种来自神经科学的简单姿势控制概念，称为干扰估计和补偿，DEC 概念[1]。由于环路增益低、时间延迟容限以及对外部干扰场景变化的自动调整，它提供了类人的机械顺应性。其突出特点是它使用多感官干扰估计的反馈而不是“原始”感觉信号来进行干扰补偿。经过 1 自由度和 2 自由度姿态控制机器人的原理验证测试后，我们在此提出了一种用于多自由度机器人的通用 DEC 控制模块。在控制布局上，1个DEC模块控制1个DOF（模块化控制架构）。相邻关节的模块使用前庭信息结合关节角度和扭矩信号协同互连。这些传感互连允许每个模块控制更远端连杆的运动学，就好像它们是单个连杆一样。与单片控制架构相比，这种模块化设计使得机器人控制的复杂性与自由度呈线性关系，并且误差鲁棒性更高。提出的概念使用 Matlab/Simulink（The MathWorks，Natick，美国）进行模型仿真和机器人控制，并将作为开放库提供 本文提出一种基于生物启发的模块化DEC控制系统，用于解决人形机器人多自由度姿态控制及外部干扰补偿问题。 Vittorio Lippi,Thomas Mergner,Georg Hettich cs.RO

authors_text: Ansh Khurana,Sujoy Paul,Piyush Rai,Soma Biswas,Gaurav Aggarwal
title: SITA: Single Image Test-time Adaptation
title_zh: SITA：单图像测试时适应
abstract: In Test-time Adaptation (TTA), given a source model, the goal is to adapt it to make better predictions for test instances from a different distribution than the source. Crucially, TTA assumes no access to the source data or even any additional labeled/unlabeled samples from the target distribution to finetune the source model. In this work, we consider TTA in a more pragmatic setting which we refer to as SITA (Single Image Test-time Adaptation). Here, when making a prediction, the model has access only to the given single test instance, rather than a batch of instances, as typically been considered in the literature. This is motivated by the realistic scenarios where inference is needed on-demand instead of delaying for an incoming batch or the inference is happening on an edge device (like mobile phone) where there is no scope for batching. The entire adaptation process in SITA should be extremely fast as it happens at inference time. To address this, we propose a novel approach AugBN that requires only a single forward pass. It can be used on any off-the-shelf trained model to test single instances for both classification and segmentation tasks. AugBN estimates normalization statistics of the unseen test distribution from the given test image using only one forward pass with label-preserving transformations. Since AugBN does not involve any back-propagation, it is significantly faster compared to recent test time adaptation methods. We further extend AugBN to make the algorithm hyperparameter-free. Rigorous experimentation show that our simple algorithm is able to achieve significant performance gains for a variety of datasets, tasks, and network architectures.
summary: In Test-time Adaptation (TTA), given a source model, the goal is to adapt it to make better predictions for test instances from a different distribution than the source. Crucially, TTA assumes no access to the source data or even any additional labeled/unlabeled samples from the target distribution to finetune the source model. In this work, we consider TTA in a more pragmatic setting which we refer to as SITA (Single Image Test-time Adaptation). Here, when making a prediction, the model has access only to the given single test instance, rather than a batch of instances, as typically been considered in the literature. This is motivated by the realistic scenarios where inference is needed on-demand instead of delaying for an incoming batch or the inference is happening on an edge device (like mobile phone) where there is no scope for batching. The entire adaptation process in SITA should be extremely fast as it happens at inference time. To address this, we propose a novel approach AugBN that requires only a single forward pass. It can be used on any off-the-shelf trained model to test single instances for both classification and segmentation tasks. AugBN estimates normalization statistics of the unseen test distribution from the given test image using only one forward pass with label-preserving transformations. Since AugBN does not involve any back-propagation, it is significantly faster compared to recent test time adaptation methods. We further extend AugBN to make the algorithm hyperparameter-free. Rigorous experimentation show that our simple algorithm is able to achieve significant performance gains for a variety of datasets, tasks, and network architectures.
abstract_zh: 在测试时适应 (TTA) 中，给定源模型，目标是对其进行调整，以便对来自与源不同分布的测试实例做出更好的预测。至关重要的是，TTA 假设无法访问源数据，甚至无法访问目标分布中的任何其他标记/未标记样本来微调源模型。在这项工作中，我们在更实用的环境中考虑 TTA，我们将其称为 SITA（单图像测试时间适应）。在这里，在进行预测时，模型只能访问给定的单个测试实例，而不是像文献中通常考虑的那样访问一批实例。这是由现实场景推动的，其中需要按需进行推理，而不是延迟传入批次，或者推理发生在没有批处理范围的边缘设备（如移动电话）上。 SITA 中的整个适应过程应该非常快，因为它发生在推理时。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的方法 AugBN，只需要一次前向传递。它可以用于任何现成的训练模型来测试分类和分割任务的单个实例。 AugBN 仅使用一次带有标签保留变换的前向传递来估计给定测试图像中未见测试分布的归一化统计量。由于 AugBN 不涉及任何反向传播，因此与最近的测试时间自适应方法相比，它的速度要快得多。我们进一步扩展 AugBN 以使算法无超参数。严格的实验表明，我们的简单算法能够为各种数据集、任务和网络架构实现显着的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SITA（单图像测试时适应），在无目标域数据的情况下，通过单张测试图像实现模型快速适应。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中边缘设备需实时处理单张图像，无法等待批量输入或进行反向传播，传统测试时适应方法不适用。
AI.method: 提出无需反向传播的AugBN方法，通过单次前向传递和标签保持变换估计测试分布的归一化统计量，并扩展为无超参数版本。
AI.result: 在多种数据集、任务和网络结构上均取得显著性能提升，且适应过程极快。
AI.conclusion: SITA为单图像实时适应提供了高效解决方案，适用于资源受限的边缘计算场景。

authors_text: Renzhen Wang,De cai,Kaiwen Xiao,Xixi Jia,Xiao Han,Deyu Meng
title: Label Hierarchy Transition: Delving into Class Hierarchies to Enhance Deep Classifiers
title_zh: 标签层次结构转换：深入研究类层次结构以增强深度分类器
abstract: Hierarchical classification aims to sort the object into a hierarchical structure of categories. For example, a bird can be categorized according to a three-level hierarchy of order, family, and species. Existing methods commonly address hierarchical classification by decoupling it into a series of multi-class classification tasks. However, such a multi-task learning strategy fails to fully exploit the correlation among various categories across different levels of the hierarchy. In this paper, we propose Label Hierarchy Transition (LHT), a unified probabilistic framework based on deep learning, to address the challenges of hierarchical classification. The LHT framework consists of a transition network and a confusion loss. The transition network focuses on explicitly learning the label hierarchy transition matrices, which has the potential to effectively encode the underlying correlations embedded within class hierarchies. The confusion loss encourages the classification network to learn correlations across different label hierarchies during training. The proposed framework can be readily adapted to any existing deep network with only minor modifications. We experiment with a series of public benchmark datasets for hierarchical classification problems, and the results demonstrate the superiority of our approach beyond current state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, we extend our proposed LHT framework to the skin lesion diagnosis task and validate its great potential in computer-aided diagnosis. The code of our method is available at \href{https://github.com/renzhenwang/label-hierarchy-transition}{https://github.com/renzhenwang/label-hierarchy-transition}.
summary: Hierarchical classification aims to sort the object into a hierarchical structure of categories. For example, a bird can be categorized according to a three-level hierarchy of order, family, and species. Existing methods commonly address hierarchical classification by decoupling it into a series of multi-class classification tasks. However, such a multi-task learning strategy fails to fully exploit the correlation among various categories across different levels of the hierarchy. In this paper, we propose Label Hierarchy Transition (LHT), a unified probabilistic framework based on deep learning, to address the challenges of hierarchical classification. The LHT framework consists of a transition network and a confusion loss. The transition network focuses on explicitly learning the label hierarchy transition matrices, which has the potential to effectively encode the underlying correlations embedded within class hierarchies. The confusion loss encourages the classification network to learn correlations across different label hierarchies during training. The proposed framework can be readily adapted to any existing deep network with only minor modifications. We experiment with a series of public benchmark datasets for hierarchical classification problems, and the results demonstrate the superiority of our approach beyond current state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, we extend our proposed LHT framework to the skin lesion diagnosis task and validate its great potential in computer-aided diagnosis. The code of our method is available at \href{https://github.com/renzhenwang/label-hierarchy-transition}{https://github.com/renzhenwang/label-hierarchy-transition}.
abstract_zh: 层次分类旨在将对象分类为类别的层次结构。例如，鸟类可以根据目、科和种的三级层次结构进行分类。现有方法通常通过将层次分类解耦为一系列多类分类任务来解决层次分类问题。然而，这种多任务学习策略未能充分利用层次结构不同级别的各种类别之间的相关性。在本文中，我们提出了标签层次转换（LHT），一种基于深度学习的统一概率框架，以解决层次分类的挑战。 LHT框架由转换网络和混淆损失组成。转换网络专注于显式学习标签层次结构转换矩阵，它有可能有效地编码嵌入类层次结构中的底层相关性。混淆损失鼓励分类网络在训练期间学习不同标签层次结构之间的相关性。所提出的框架只需进行少量修改即可轻松适应任何现有的深度网络。我们对一系列用于层次分类问题的公共基准数据集进行了实验，结果证明了我们的方法超越当前最先进方法的优越性。此外，我们将我们提出的 LHT 框架扩展到皮肤病变诊断任务，并验证其在计算机辅助诊断中的巨大潜力。我们方法的代码可以在\href{https://github.com/renzhenwang/label-hierarchy-transition}{https://github.com/renzhenwang/label-hierarchy-transition}获得。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的统一概率框架Label Hierarchy Transition（LHT），通过显式学习类别层次结构的转换矩阵和引入混淆损失函数，提升层次化分类的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有层次化分类方法通过解耦为多分类任务处理，未能充分利用不同层次类别间的相关性，导致分类效果受限。
AI.method: LHT框架包含转换网络和混淆损失。转换网络显式学习标签层次转换矩阵以编码类别间潜在关联，混淆损失则通过训练促使分类网络跨层次学习相关性。
AI.result: 在多个公开基准数据集上验证了LHT优于现有最先进方法，并成功扩展至皮肤病变诊断任务，展现出在计算机辅助诊断中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: LHT框架通过建模类别层次关联有效提升了层次化分类性能，其设计具有通用性且易于集成到现有深度网络中。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的统一概率框架Label Hierarchy Transition（LHT），通过显式学习类别层次结构的转换矩阵和引入混淆损失函数，提升层次化分类的性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有层次化分类方法通过解耦为多分类任务处理，未能充分利用不同层次类别间的相关性，导致分类效果受限。
ai_content.method: LHT框架包含转换网络和混淆损失。转换网络显式学习标签层次转换矩阵以编码类别间潜在关联，混淆损失则通过训练促使分类网络跨层次学习相关性。
ai_content.result: 在多个公开基准数据集上验证了LHT优于现有最先进方法，并成功扩展至皮肤病变诊断任务，展现出在计算机辅助诊断中的应用潜力。
ai_content.conclusion: LHT框架通过建模类别层次关联有效提升了层次化分类性能，其设计具有通用性且易于集成到现有深度网络中。

search_text: Label Hierarchy Transition: Delving into Class Hierarchies to Enhance Deep Classifiers 标签层次结构转换：深入研究类层次结构以增强深度分类器 Hierarchical classification aims to sort the object into a hierarchical structure of categories. For example, a bird can be categorized according to a three-level hierarchy of order, family, and species. Existing methods commonly address hierarchical classification by decoupling it into a series of multi-class classification tasks. However, such a multi-task learning strategy fails to fully exploit the correlation among various categories across different levels of the hierarchy. In this paper, we propose Label Hierarchy Transition (LHT), a unified probabilistic framework based on deep learning, to address the challenges of hierarchical classification. The LHT framework consists of a transition network and a confusion loss. The transition network focuses on explicitly learning the label hierarchy transition matrices, which has the potential to effectively encode the underlying correlations embedded within class hierarchies. The confusion loss encourages the classification network to learn correlations across different label hierarchies during training. The proposed framework can be readily adapted to any existing deep network with only minor modifications. We experiment with a series of public benchmark datasets for hierarchical classification problems, and the results demonstrate the superiority of our approach beyond current state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, we extend our proposed LHT framework to the skin lesion diagnosis task and validate its great potential in computer-aided diagnosis. The code of our method is available at \href{https://github.com/renzhenwang/label-hierarchy-transition}{https://github.com/renzhenwang/label-hierarchy-transition}. 层次分类旨在将对象分类为类别的层次结构。例如，鸟类可以根据目、科和种的三级层次结构进行分类。现有方法通常通过将层次分类解耦为一系列多类分类任务来解决层次分类问题。然而，这种多任务学习策略未能充分利用层次结构不同级别的各种类别之间的相关性。在本文中，我们提出了标签层次转换（LHT），一种基于深度学习的统一概率框架，以解决层次分类的挑战。 LHT框架由转换网络和混淆损失组成。转换网络专注于显式学习标签层次结构转换矩阵，它有可能有效地编码嵌入类层次结构中的底层相关性。混淆损失鼓励分类网络在训练期间学习不同标签层次结构之间的相关性。所提出的框架只需进行少量修改即可轻松适应任何现有的深度网络。我们对一系列用于层次分类问题的公共基准数据集进行了实验，结果证明了我们的方法超越当前最先进方法的优越性。此外，我们将我们提出的 LHT 框架扩展到皮肤病变诊断任务，并验证其在计算机辅助诊断中的巨大潜力。我们方法的代码可以在\href{https://github.com/renzhenwang/label-hierarchy-transition}{https://github.com/renzhenwang/label-hierarchy-transition}获得。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的统一概率框架Label Hierarchy Transition（LHT），通过显式学习类别层次结构的转换矩阵和引入混淆损失函数，提升层次化分类的性能。 Renzhen Wang,De cai,Kaiwen Xiao,Xixi Jia,Xiao Han,Deyu Meng cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jian Peng,Dingqi Ye,Bo Tang,Yinjie Lei,Yu Liu,Haifeng Li
title: Overcome Anterograde Forgetting with Cycled Memory Networks
title_zh: 用循环记忆网络克服顺行性遗忘
comment: 14 pages, 15 figures
comments: 14 pages, 15 figures
abstract: Learning from a sequence of tasks for a lifetime is essential for an agent towards artificial general intelligence. This requires the agent to continuously learn and memorize new knowledge without interference. This paper first demonstrates a fundamental issue of lifelong learning using neural networks, named anterograde forgetting, i.e., preserving and transferring memory may inhibit the learning of new knowledge. This is attributed to the fact that the learning capacity of a neural network will be reduced as it keeps memorizing historical knowledge, and the fact that conceptual confusion may occur as it transfers irrelevant old knowledge to the current task. This work proposes a general framework named Cycled Memory Networks (CMN) to address the anterograde forgetting in neural networks for lifelong learning. The CMN consists of two individual memory networks to store short-term and long-term memories to avoid capacity shrinkage. A transfer cell is designed to connect these two memory networks, enabling knowledge transfer from the long-term memory network to the short-term memory network to mitigate the conceptual confusion, and a memory consolidation mechanism is developed to integrate short-term knowledge into the long-term memory network for knowledge accumulation. Experimental results demonstrate that the CMN can effectively address the anterograde forgetting on several task-related, task-conflict, class-incremental and cross-domain benchmarks.
summary: Learning from a sequence of tasks for a lifetime is essential for an agent towards artificial general intelligence. This requires the agent to continuously learn and memorize new knowledge without interference. This paper first demonstrates a fundamental issue of lifelong learning using neural networks, named anterograde forgetting, i.e., preserving and transferring memory may inhibit the learning of new knowledge. This is attributed to the fact that the learning capacity of a neural network will be reduced as it keeps memorizing historical knowledge, and the fact that conceptual confusion may occur as it transfers irrelevant old knowledge to the current task. This work proposes a general framework named Cycled Memory Networks (CMN) to address the anterograde forgetting in neural networks for lifelong learning. The CMN consists of two individual memory networks to store short-term and long-term memories to avoid capacity shrinkage. A transfer cell is designed to connect these two memory networks, enabling knowledge transfer from the long-term memory network to the short-term memory network to mitigate the conceptual confusion, and a memory consolidation mechanism is developed to integrate short-term knowledge into the long-term memory network for knowledge accumulation. Experimental results demonstrate that the CMN can effectively address the anterograde forgetting on several task-related, task-conflict, class-incremental and cross-domain benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 一生从一系列任务中学习对于智能体走向通用人工智能至关重要。这就要求智能体在不受干扰的情况下不断学习和记忆新知识。本文首先论证了使用神经网络进行终身学习的一个基本问题，即顺行遗忘，即保存和转移记忆可能会抑制新知识的学习。这是因为神经网络在不断记忆历史知识的过程中，其学习能力会降低，并且将不相关的旧知识转移到当前任务中时，可能会出现概念混乱。这项工作提出了一个名为循环记忆网络（CMN）的通用框架，以解决终身学习神经网络中的顺行遗忘问题。 CMN 由两个独立的记忆网络组成，分别存储短期和长期记忆，以避免容量缩减。设计了一个转移单元来连接这两个记忆网络，使知识从长期记忆网络转移到短期记忆网络，以减轻概念混乱，并开发记忆巩固机制，将短期知识整合到长期记忆网络中，以实现知识积累。实验结果表明，CMN 可以有效解决多个任务相关、任务冲突、类增量和跨域基准测试中的顺行遗忘问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Cycled Memory Networks (CMN)的框架，用于解决神经网络在终身学习中的顺行性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 神经网络在持续学习新任务时容易出现顺行性遗忘，即学习新知识会干扰对旧知识的记忆，导致容量缩减和概念混淆。
AI.method: CMN框架包含两个独立的记忆网络（短期和长期记忆）及一个转移单元，通过知识转移和记忆巩固机制实现新旧知识的分离与整合。
AI.result: 实验表明，CMN在多个任务相关、任务冲突、类别增量和跨域基准测试中有效缓解了顺行性遗忘问题。
AI.conclusion: CMN通过分离记忆存储和定向知识转移，为神经网络的终身学习提供了有效解决方案。

title: Scanpath Prediction on Information Visualisations
title_zh: 信息可视化的扫描路径预测
comment: 11 pages, 6 figures
comments: 11 pages, 6 figures
abstract: We propose Unified Model of Saliency and Scanpaths (UMSS) -- a model that learns to predict visual saliency and scanpaths (i.e. sequences of eye fixations) on information visualisations. Although scanpaths provide rich information about the importance of different visualisation elements during the visual exploration process, prior work has been limited to predicting aggregated attention statistics, such as visual saliency. We present in-depth analyses of gaze behaviour for different information visualisation elements (e.g. Title, Label, Data) on the popular MASSVIS dataset. We show that while, overall, gaze patterns are surprisingly consistent across visualisations and viewers, there are also structural differences in gaze dynamics for different elements. Informed by our analyses, UMSS first predicts multi-duration element-level saliency maps, then probabilistically samples scanpaths from them. Extensive experiments on MASSVIS show that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods with respect to several, widely used scanpath and saliency evaluation metrics. Our method achieves a relative improvement in sequence score of 11.5% for scanpath prediction, and a relative improvement in Pearson correlation coefficient of up to 23.6% for saliency prediction. These results are auspicious and point towards richer user models and simulations of visual attention on visualisations without the need for any eye tracking equipment.
summary: We propose Unified Model of Saliency and Scanpaths (UMSS) -- a model that learns to predict visual saliency and scanpaths (i.e. sequences of eye fixations) on information visualisations. Although scanpaths provide rich information about the importance of different visualisation elements during the visual exploration process, prior work has been limited to predicting aggregated attention statistics, such as visual saliency. We present in-depth analyses of gaze behaviour for different information visualisation elements (e.g. Title, Label, Data) on the popular MASSVIS dataset. We show that while, overall, gaze patterns are surprisingly consistent across visualisations and viewers, there are also structural differences in gaze dynamics for different elements. Informed by our analyses, UMSS first predicts multi-duration element-level saliency maps, then probabilistically samples scanpaths from them. Extensive experiments on MASSVIS show that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods with respect to several, widely used scanpath and saliency evaluation metrics. Our method achieves a relative improvement in sequence score of 11.5% for scanpath prediction, and a relative improvement in Pearson correlation coefficient of up to 23.6% for saliency prediction. These results are auspicious and point towards richer user models and simulations of visual attention on visualisations without the need for any eye tracking equipment.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了显着性和扫描路径统一模型（UMSS）——一种学习预测信息可视化的视觉显着性和扫描路径（即眼睛注视序列）的模型。尽管扫描路径提供了有关视觉探索过程中不同可视化元素重要性的丰富信息，但先前的工作仅限于预测聚合注意力统计数据，例如视觉显着性。我们对流行的 MASSVIS 数据集上不同信息可视化元素（例如标题、标签、数据）的注视行为进行了深入分析。我们表明，虽然总体而言，不同视觉效果和观看者的注视模式惊人地一致，但不同元素的注视动态也存在结构差异。根据我们的分析，UMSS 首先预测多持续时间元素级显着性图，然后从中概率采样扫描路径。 MASSVIS 上的大量实验表明，我们的方法在几个广泛使用的扫描路径和显着性评估指标方面始终优于最先进的方法。我们的方法使扫描路径预测的序列得分相对提高了 11.5%，显着性预测的皮尔逊相关系数相对提高了 23.6%。这些结果是吉祥的，并指向更丰富的用户模型和可视化视觉注意力的模拟，而无需任何眼动追踪设备。

AI.tldr: 本文提出统一显著性与眼动轨迹模型（UMSS），用于预测信息可视化中的视觉显著性及眼动轨迹序列。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多局限于预测聚合注意力统计量（如显著性），而眼动轨迹能提供更丰富的视觉探索信息，需开发更精细的预测模型。
AI.method: 基于MASSVIS数据集分析不同可视化元素的注视行为差异，构建多时长元素级显著性图，再通过概率采样生成眼动轨迹。
AI.result: 在MASSVIS数据集上，UMSS在眼动轨迹序列得分上提升11.5%，显著性预测的皮尔逊相关系数最高提升23.6%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无需眼动设备的可视化注意力模拟提供了更精准的用户模型，推动了可视化交互研究的发展。

search_text: Scanpath Prediction on Information Visualisations 信息可视化的扫描路径预测 We propose Unified Model of Saliency and Scanpaths (UMSS) -- a model that learns to predict visual saliency and scanpaths (i.e. sequences of eye fixations) on information visualisations. Although scanpaths provide rich information about the importance of different visualisation elements during the visual exploration process, prior work has been limited to predicting aggregated attention statistics, such as visual saliency. We present in-depth analyses of gaze behaviour for different information visualisation elements (e.g. Title, Label, Data) on the popular MASSVIS dataset. We show that while, overall, gaze patterns are surprisingly consistent across visualisations and viewers, there are also structural differences in gaze dynamics for different elements. Informed by our analyses, UMSS first predicts multi-duration element-level saliency maps, then probabilistically samples scanpaths from them. Extensive experiments on MASSVIS show that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods with respect to several, widely used scanpath and saliency evaluation metrics. Our method achieves a relative improvement in sequence score of 11.5% for scanpath prediction, and a relative improvement in Pearson correlation coefficient of up to 23.6% for saliency prediction. These results are auspicious and point towards richer user models and simulations of visual attention on visualisations without the need for any eye tracking equipment. 我们提出了显着性和扫描路径统一模型（UMSS）——一种学习预测信息可视化的视觉显着性和扫描路径（即眼睛注视序列）的模型。尽管扫描路径提供了有关视觉探索过程中不同可视化元素重要性的丰富信息，但先前的工作仅限于预测聚合注意力统计数据，例如视觉显着性。我们对流行的 MASSVIS 数据集上不同信息可视化元素（例如标题、标签、数据）的注视行为进行了深入分析。我们表明，虽然总体而言，不同视觉效果和观看者的注视模式惊人地一致，但不同元素的注视动态也存在结构差异。根据我们的分析，UMSS 首先预测多持续时间元素级显着性图，然后从中概率采样扫描路径。 MASSVIS 上的大量实验表明，我们的方法在几个广泛使用的扫描路径和显着性评估指标方面始终优于最先进的方法。我们的方法使扫描路径预测的序列得分相对提高了 11.5%，显着性预测的皮尔逊相关系数相对提高了 23.6%。这些结果是吉祥的，并指向更丰富的用户模型和可视化视觉注意力的模拟，而无需任何眼动追踪设备。 本文提出统一显著性与眼动轨迹模型（UMSS），用于预测信息可视化中的视觉显著性及眼动轨迹序列。 Yao Wang,Mihai Bâce,Andreas Bulling cs.CV,cs.HC

title: Generalized Binary Search Network for Highly-Efficient Multi-View Stereo
title_zh: 用于高效多视图立体的广义二分搜索网络
comment: 16 pages
comments: 16 pages
abstract: Multi-view Stereo (MVS) with known camera parameters is essentially a 1D search problem within a valid depth range. Recent deep learning-based MVS methods typically densely sample depth hypotheses in the depth range, and then construct prohibitively memory-consuming 3D cost volumes for depth prediction. Although coarse-to-fine sampling strategies alleviate this overhead issue to a certain extent, the efficiency of MVS is still an open challenge. In this work, we propose a novel method for highly efficient MVS that remarkably decreases the memory footprint, meanwhile clearly advancing state-of-the-art depth prediction performance. We investigate what a search strategy can be reasonably optimal for MVS taking into account of both efficiency and effectiveness. We first formulate MVS as a binary search problem, and accordingly propose a generalized binary search network for MVS. Specifically, in each step, the depth range is split into 2 bins with extra 1 error tolerance bin on both sides. A classification is performed to identify which bin contains the true depth. We also design three mechanisms to respectively handle classification errors, deal with out-of-range samples and decrease the training memory. The new formulation makes our method only sample a very small number of depth hypotheses in each step, which is highly memory efficient, and also greatly facilitates quick training convergence. Experiments on competitive benchmarks show that our method achieves state-of-the-art accuracy with much less memory. Particularly, our method obtains an overall score of 0.289 on DTU dataset and tops the first place on challenging Tanks and Temples advanced dataset among all the learning-based methods. The trained models and code will be released at https://github.com/MiZhenxing/GBi-Net.

We also design three mechanisms to respectively handle classification errors, deal with out-of-range samples and decrease the training memory. The new formulation makes our method only sample a very small number of depth hypotheses in each step, which is highly memory efficient, and also greatly facilitates quick training convergence. Experiments on competitive benchmarks show that our method achieves state-of-the-art accuracy with much less memory. Particularly, our method obtains an overall score of 0.289 on DTU dataset and tops the first place on challenging Tanks and Temples advanced dataset among all the learning-based methods. abstract_zh: 已知相机参数的多视图立体（MVS）本质上是有效深度范围内的一维搜索问题。最近基于深度学习的 MVS 方法通常在深度范围内密集采样深度假设，然后构建消耗大量内存的 3D 成本卷进行深度预测。尽管从粗到精的采样策略在一定程度上缓解了这种开销问题，但 MVS 的效率仍然是一个开放的挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种高效 MVS 的新方法，可以显着减少内存占用，同时明显提高最先进的深度预测性能。我们研究了在考虑效率和有效性的情况下对于 MVS 来说什么搜索策略可以合理优化。我们首先将 MVS 表述为二分搜索问题，并相应地提出了 MVS 的广义二分搜索网络。具体来说，在每个步骤中，深度范围被分为 2 个 bin，两侧都有额外的 1 个误差容限 bin。执行分类以确定哪个箱包含真实深度。我们还设计了三种机制来分别处理分类错误、处理超出范围的样本和减少训练内存。新的公式使得我们的方法在每个步骤中仅采样极少量的深度假设，这具有很高的内存效率，并且也极大地促进了快速训练收敛。对竞争基准的实验表明，我们的方法以更少的内存实现了最先进的精度。特别是，我们的方法在 DTU 数据集上获得了 0.289 的总分，并且在所有基于学习的方法中在具有挑战性的 Tanks 和 Temples 高级数据集上名列第一。训练好的模型和代码将在https://github.com/MiZhenxing/GBi-Net发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的多视角立体视觉（MVS）方法，通过二分搜索网络显著减少内存占用并提升深度预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的MVS方法因密集采样深度假设导致内存消耗过大，且效率问题仍未解决，亟需兼顾效率与精度的优化方案。
AI.method: 将MVS建模为二分搜索问题，每步将深度范围分为2个主区间及两侧误差容忍区间，通过分类确定真实深度所在区间，并设计误差处理、越界样本处理及训练内存优化机制。
AI.result: 在DTU数据集上达到0.289的最优整体得分，在Tanks and Temples高级数据集中超越所有基于学习的方法，内存效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过二分搜索策略实现了高效且高精度的MVS，为深度估计提供了兼顾内存与性能的创新解决方案。

authors_text: Qiang Wu,Liang Zhang,Jun Shen,Linyuan Lü,Bo Du,Jianqing Wu
title: Efficient Pressure: Improving efficiency for signalized intersections
title_zh: 高效压力：提高信号交叉口的效率
comment: 7pages, 3figures
comments: 7pages, 3figures
abstract: Since conventional approaches could not adapt to dynamic traffic conditions, reinforcement learning (RL) has attracted more attention to help solve the traffic signal control (TSC) problem. However, existing RL-based methods are rarely deployed considering that they are neither cost-effective in terms of computing resources nor more robust than traditional approaches, which raises a critical research question: how to construct an adaptive controller for TSC with less training and reduced complexity based on RL-based approach? To address this question, in this paper, we (1) innovatively specify the traffic movement representation as a simple but efficient pressure of vehicle queues in a traffic network, namely efficient pressure (EP); (2) build a traffic signal settings protocol, including phase duration, signal phase number and EP for TSC; (3) design a TSC approach based on the traditional max pressure (MP) approach, namely efficient max pressure (Efficient-MP) using the EP to capture the traffic state; and (4) develop a general RL-based TSC algorithm template: efficient Xlight (Efficient-XLight) under EP. Through comprehensive experiments on multiple real-world datasets in our traffic signal settings' protocol for TSC, we demonstrate that efficient pressure is complementary to traditional and RL-based modeling to design better TSC methods. Our code is released on Github.
summary: Since conventional approaches could not adapt to dynamic traffic conditions, reinforcement learning (RL) has attracted more attention to help solve the traffic signal control (TSC) problem. However, existing RL-based methods are rarely deployed considering that they are neither cost-effective in terms of computing resources nor more robust than traditional approaches, which raises a critical research question: how to construct an adaptive controller for TSC with less training and reduced complexity based on RL-based approach? To address this question, in this paper, we (1) innovatively specify the traffic movement representation as a simple but efficient pressure of vehicle queues in a traffic network, namely efficient pressure (EP); (2) build a traffic signal settings protocol, including phase duration, signal phase number and EP for TSC; (3) design a TSC approach based on the traditional max pressure (MP) approach, namely efficient max pressure (Efficient-MP) using the EP to capture the traffic state; and (4) develop a general RL-based TSC algorithm template: efficient Xlight (Efficient-XLight) under EP. Through comprehensive experiments on multiple real-world datasets in our traffic signal settings' protocol for TSC, we demonstrate that efficient pressure is complementary to traditional and RL-based modeling to design better TSC methods. Our code is released on Github.
abstract_zh: 由于传统方法无法适应动态交通条件，强化学习（RL）引起了更多关注，以帮助解决交通信号控制（TSC）问题。然而，现有的基于强化学习的方法很少被部署，因为它们在计算资源方面既不具有成本效益，也比传统方法更鲁棒，这就提出了一个关键的研究问题：如何基于基于强化学习的方法构建一个训练较少、复杂性降低的 TSC 自适应控制器？为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们（1）创新地将交通运动表示指定为交通网络中车辆队列的简单但有效的压力，即有效压力（EP）； (2) 建立交通信号设置协议，包括 TSC 的相位持续时间、信号相位数和 EP； (3)在传统最大压力(MP)方法的基础上设计一种TSC方法，即利用EP捕获流量状态的高效最大压力(Efficient-MP)； (4)开发通用的基于RL的TSC算法模板：EP下的高效Xlight(Efficient-XLight)。通过对 TSC 交通信号设置协议中的多个真实世界数据集进行综合实验，我们证明了有效压力可以与传统和基于 RL 的建模相补充，以设计更好的 TSC 方法。我们的代码发布在 Github 上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的高效交通信号控制方法，以提高信号交叉口的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统方法无法适应动态交通状况，而现有基于强化学习的方法在计算资源消耗和鲁棒性方面存在问题，因此需要一种更高效、更简单的交通信号控制方法。
AI.method: 本文创新性地提出了一种称为高效压力（EP）的交通流表示方法，并构建了基于EP的信号控制协议，设计了基于传统最大压力（MP）方法的高效最大压力（Efficient-MP）方法，同时开发了一种基于EP的通用强化学习交通信号控制算法模板：Efficient-XLight。
AI.result: 通过在多个真实世界数据集上的实验，证明了高效压力方法在传统方法和基于强化学习的建模中具有互补性，可以设计出更好的交通信号控制方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的高效压力方法为交通信号控制提供了一种更高效、更简单的解决方案，具有重要的应用价值。

search_text: Efficient Pressure: Improving efficiency for signalized intersections 高效压力：提高信号交叉口的效率 Since conventional approaches could not adapt to dynamic traffic conditions, reinforcement learning (RL) has attracted more attention to help solve the traffic signal control (TSC) problem. However, existing RL-based methods are rarely deployed considering that they are neither cost-effective in terms of computing resources nor more robust than traditional approaches, which raises a critical research question: how to construct an adaptive controller for TSC with less training and reduced complexity based on RL-based approach? To address this question, in this paper, we (1) innovatively specify the traffic movement representation as a simple but efficient pressure of vehicle queues in a traffic network, namely efficient pressure (EP); (2) build a traffic signal settings protocol, including phase duration, signal phase number and EP for TSC; (3) design a TSC approach based on the traditional max pressure (MP) approach, namely efficient max pressure (Efficient-MP) using the EP to capture the traffic state; and (4) develop a general RL-based TSC algorithm template: efficient Xlight (Efficient-XLight) under EP. Through comprehensive experiments on multiple real-world datasets in our traffic signal settings' protocol for TSC, we demonstrate that efficient pressure is complementary to traditional and RL-based modeling to design better TSC methods. Our code is released on Github. 由于传统方法无法适应动态交通条件，强化学习（RL）引起了更多关注，以帮助解决交通信号控制（TSC）问题。然而，现有的基于强化学习的方法很少被部署，因为它们在计算资源方面既不具有成本效益，也比传统方法更鲁棒，这就提出了一个关键的研究问题：如何基于基于强化学习的方法构建一个训练较少、复杂性降低的 TSC 自适应控制器？为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们（1）创新地将交通运动表示指定为交通网络中车辆队列的简单但有效的压力，即有效压力（EP）； (2) 建立交通信号设置协议，包括 TSC 的相位持续时间、信号相位数和 EP； (3)在传统最大压力(MP)方法的基础上设计一种TSC方法，即利用EP捕获流量状态的高效最大压力(Efficient-MP)； (4)开发通用的基于RL的TSC算法模板：EP下的高效Xlight(Efficient-XLight)。通过对 TSC 交通信号设置协议中的多个真实世界数据集进行综合实验，我们证明了有效压力可以与传统和基于 RL 的建模相补充，以设计更好的 TSC 方法。我们的代码发布在 Github 上。 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的高效交通信号控制方法，以提高信号交叉口的效率。 Qiang Wu,Liang Zhang,Jun Shen,Linyuan Lü,Bo Du,Jianqing Wu cs.LG,cs.AI

title: LoNLI: An Extensible Framework for Testing Diverse Logical Reasoning Capabilities for NLI
title_zh: LoNLI：用于测试 NLI 多种逻辑推理能力的可扩展框架
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.07229
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.07229
abstract: Natural Language Inference (NLI) is considered a representative task to test natural language understanding (NLU). In this work, we propose an extensible framework to collectively yet categorically test diverse Logical reasoning capabilities required for NLI (and, by extension, NLU). Motivated by behavioral testing, we create a semi-synthetic large test bench (363 templates, 363k examples) and an associated framework that offers the following utilities: 1) individually test and analyze reasoning capabilities along 17 reasoning dimensions (including pragmatic reasoning); 2) design experiments to study cross-capability information content (leave one out or bring one in); and 3) the synthetic nature enables us to control for artifacts and biases. We extend a publicly available framework of automated test case instantiation from free-form natural language templates (CheckList) and a well-defined taxonomy of capabilities to cover a wide range of increasingly harder test cases while varying the complexity of natural language. Through our analysis of state-of-the-art NLI systems, we observe that our benchmark is indeed hard (and non-trivial even with training on additional resources). Some capabilities stand out as harder. Further, fine-grained analysis and fine-tuning experiments reveal more insights about these capabilities and the models -- supporting and extending previous observations; thus showing the utility of the proposed testbench.
summary: Natural Language Inference (NLI) is considered a representative task to test natural language understanding (NLU). In this work, we propose an extensible framework to collectively yet categorically test diverse Logical reasoning capabilities required for NLI (and, by extension, NLU). Motivated by behavioral testing, we create a semi-synthetic large test bench (363 templates, 363k examples) and an associated framework that offers the following utilities: 1) individually test and analyze reasoning capabilities along 17 reasoning dimensions (including pragmatic reasoning); 2) design experiments to study cross-capability information content (leave one out or bring one in); and 3) the synthetic nature enables us to control for artifacts and biases. We extend a publicly available framework of automated test case instantiation from free-form natural language templates (CheckList) and a well-defined taxonomy of capabilities to cover a wide range of increasingly harder test cases while varying the complexity of natural language. Through our analysis of state-of-the-art NLI systems, we observe that our benchmark is indeed hard (and non-trivial even with training on additional resources). Some capabilities stand out as harder. Further, fine-grained analysis and fine-tuning experiments reveal more insights about these capabilities and the models -- supporting and extending previous observations; thus showing the utility of the proposed testbench.
abstract_zh: 自然语言推理（NLI）被认为是测试自然语言理解（NLU）的代表性任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个可扩展的框架，以集体但分类地测试 NLI（以及扩展的 NLU）所需的各种逻辑推理能力。在行为测试的推动下，我们创建了一个半综合的大型测试平台（363个模板，363k个示例）和一个提供以下实用程序的相关框架：1）沿着17个推理维度（包括语用推理）单独测试和分析推理能力； 2）设计实验来研究跨能力信息内容（留一或带一）； 3）合成性质使我们能够控制伪影和偏差。我们从自由格式的自然语言模板 (CheckList) 和定义明确的功能分类中扩展了一个公开可用的自动化测试用例实例化框架，以涵盖各种越来越难的测试用例，同时改变自然语言的复杂性。通过对最先进的 NLI 系统的分析，我们发现我们的基准测试确实很难（即使经过额外资源的培训也并非微不足道）。有些能力显得更加困难。此外，细粒度分析和微调实验揭示了有关这些功能和模型的更多见解——支持和扩展了之前的观察结果；从而显示了所提出的测试平台的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LoNLI框架，用于系统性测试自然语言推理（NLI）任务中所需的多样化逻辑推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有NLI评估缺乏对逻辑推理能力的细粒度分析，需构建可扩展框架以分类测试不同推理维度并控制偏差。
AI.method: 基于行为测试理念，创建包含363个模板和363k示例的半合成测试集，结合CheckList框架与能力分类体系，支持17个推理维度的独立测试及跨能力实验分析。
AI.result: 实验表明该基准对前沿NLI模型具有挑战性，部分能力（如实用推理）更难，细粒度分析揭示了模型在不同推理维度上的差异。
AI.conclusion: LoNLI框架有效验证了NLI模型的逻辑推理能力，为改进模型设计和训练策略提供了可解释的分析工具。

authors_text: Xiaolin Hu,Kai Li,Weiyi Zhang,Yi Luo,Jean-Marie Lemercier,Timo Gerkmann
title: Speech Separation Using an Asynchronous Fully Recurrent Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 使用异步全循环卷积神经网络进行语音分离
comment: Accepted by NeurIPS 2021, Demo at https://cslikai.cn/project/AFRCNN
comments: Accepted by NeurIPS 2021, Demo at https://cslikai.cn/project/AFRCNN
abstract: Recent advances in the design of neural network architectures, in particular those specialized in modeling sequences, have provided significant improvements in speech separation performance. In this work, we propose to use a bio-inspired architecture called Fully Recurrent Convolutional Neural Network (FRCNN) to solve the separation task. This model contains bottom-up, top-down and lateral connections to fuse information processed at various time-scales represented by \textit{stages}. In contrast to the traditional approach updating stages in parallel, we propose to first update the stages one by one in the bottom-up direction, then fuse information from adjacent stages simultaneously and finally fuse information from all stages to the bottom stage together. Experiments showed that this asynchronous updating scheme achieved significantly better results with much fewer parameters than the traditional synchronous updating scheme. In addition, the proposed model achieved good balance between speech separation accuracy and computational efficiency as compared to other state-of-the-art models on three benchmark datasets.
summary: Recent advances in the design of neural network architectures, in particular those specialized in modeling sequences, have provided significant improvements in speech separation performance. In this work, we propose to use a bio-inspired architecture called Fully Recurrent Convolutional Neural Network (FRCNN) to solve the separation task. This model contains bottom-up, top-down and lateral connections to fuse information processed at various time-scales represented by \textit{stages}. In contrast to the traditional approach updating stages in parallel, we propose to first update the stages one by one in the bottom-up direction, then fuse information from adjacent stages simultaneously and finally fuse information from all stages to the bottom stage together. Experiments showed that this asynchronous updating scheme achieved significantly better results with much fewer parameters than the traditional synchronous updating scheme. In addition, the proposed model achieved good balance between speech separation accuracy and computational efficiency as compared to other state-of-the-art models on three benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 神经网络架构设计的最新进展，特别是专门用于序列建模的神经网络架构设计，在语音分离性能方面提供了显着的改进。在这项工作中，我们建议使用一种称为完全循环卷积神经网络（FRCNN）的仿生架构来解决分离任务。该模型包含自下而上、自上而下和横向连接，以融合在 \textit{stages} 表示的不同时间尺度处理的信息。与并行更新阶段的传统方法相比，我们建议首先自下而上地逐个更新阶段，然后同时融合来自相邻阶段的信息，最后将所有阶段到底层阶段的信息融合在一起。实验表明，与传统的同步更新方案相比，该异步更新方案以更少的参数获得了明显更好的结果。此外，与三个基准数据集上的其他最先进的模型相比，所提出的模型在语音分离精度和计算效率之间实现了良好的平衡。

AI.tldr: 提出一种异步全递归卷积神经网络（FRCNN）用于语音分离任务，通过异步更新机制提升分离效果。
AI.motivation: 传统语音分离模型参数多、效率低，需更高效架构；受生物启发的FRCNN能融合多时间尺度信息，可能提升性能。
AI.method: 设计异步FRCNN，包含自底向上、横向及自顶向下连接，分阶段异步更新，先逐层更新，再同时融合相邻阶段，最后全局融合。
AI.result: 异步方案在更少参数下显著优于传统同步方法，三个数据集上分离准确率与计算效率优于其他先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 异步FRCNN通过优化信息融合机制，在减少参数的同时提升性能，为高效语音分离提供新思路。

In contrast to the traditional approach updating stages in parallel, we propose to first update the stages one by one in the bottom-up direction, then fuse information from adjacent stages simultaneously and finally fuse information from all stages to the bottom stage together. Experiments showed that this asynchronous updating scheme achieved significantly better results with much fewer parameters than the traditional synchronous updating scheme. In addition, the proposed model achieved good balance between speech separation accuracy and computational efficiency as compared to other state-of-the-art models on three benchmark datasets. 神经网络架构设计的最新进展，特别是专门用于序列建模的神经网络架构设计，在语音分离性能方面提供了显着的改进。在这项工作中，我们建议使用一种称为完全循环卷积神经网络（FRCNN）的仿生架构来解决分离任务。该模型包含自下而上、自上而下和横向连接，以融合在 \textit{stages} 表示的不同时间尺度处理的信息。与并行更新阶段的传统方法相比，我们建议首先自下而上地逐个更新阶段，然后同时融合来自相邻阶段的信息，最后将所有阶段到底层阶段的信息融合在一起。实验表明，与传统的同步更新方案相比，该异步更新方案以更少的参数获得了明显更好的结果。此外，与三个基准数据集上的其他最先进的模型相比，所提出的模型在语音分离精度和计算效率之间实现了良好的平衡。 提出一种异步全递归卷积神经网络（FRCNN）用于语音分离任务，通过异步更新机制提升分离效果。 Xiaolin Hu,Kai Li,Weiyi Zhang,Yi Luo,Jean-Marie Lemercier,Timo Gerkmann cs.SD,eess.AS

title: MoFaNeRF: Morphable Facial Neural Radiance Field
title_zh: MoFaNeRF：可变形面部神经辐射场
comment: accepted to ECCV2022; code available at http://github.com/zhuhao-nju/mofanerf
comments: accepted to ECCV2022; code available at http://github.com/zhuhao-nju/mofanerf
abstract: We propose a parametric model that maps free-view images into a vector space of coded facial shape, expression and appearance with a neural radiance field, namely Morphable Facial NeRF. Specifically, MoFaNeRF takes the coded facial shape, expression and appearance along with space coordinate and view direction as input to an MLP, and outputs the radiance of the space point for photo-realistic image synthesis. Compared with conventional 3D morphable models (3DMM), MoFaNeRF shows superiority in directly synthesizing photo-realistic facial details even for eyes, mouths, and beards. Also, continuous face morphing can be easily achieved by interpolating the input shape, expression and appearance codes. By introducing identity-specific modulation and texture encoder, our model synthesizes accurate photometric details and shows strong representation ability. Our model shows strong ability on multiple applications including image-based fitting, random generation, face rigging, face editing, and novel view synthesis. Experiments show that our method achieves higher representation ability than previous parametric models, and achieves competitive performance in several applications. To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first facial parametric model built upon a neural radiance field that can be used in fitting, generation and manipulation. The code and data is available at https://github.com/zhuhao-nju/mofanerf.
summary: We propose a parametric model that maps free-view images into a vector space of coded facial shape, expression and appearance with a neural radiance field, namely Morphable Facial NeRF. Specifically, MoFaNeRF takes the coded facial shape, expression and appearance along with space coordinate and view direction as input to an MLP, and outputs the radiance of the space point for photo-realistic image synthesis. Compared with conventional 3D morphable models (3DMM), MoFaNeRF shows superiority in directly synthesizing photo-realistic facial details even for eyes, mouths, and beards. Also, continuous face morphing can be easily achieved by interpolating the input shape, expression and appearance codes. By introducing identity-specific modulation and texture encoder, our model synthesizes accurate photometric details and shows strong representation ability. Our model shows strong ability on multiple applications including image-based fitting, random generation, face rigging, face editing, and novel view synthesis. Experiments show that our method achieves higher representation ability than previous parametric models, and achieves competitive performance in several applications. To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first facial parametric model built upon a neural radiance field that can be used in fitting, generation and manipulation. The code and data is available at https://github.com/zhuhao-nju/mofanerf.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种参数模型，将自由视图图像映射到带有神经辐射场的编码面部形状、表情和外观的向量空间，即 Morphable Facial NeRF。具体来说，MoFaNeRF 将编码的面部形状、表情和外观以及空间坐标和视角方向作为 MLP 的输入，并输出空间点的辐射亮度以进行逼真的图像合成。与传统的3D可变形模型（3DMM）相比，MoFaNeRF在直接合成逼真的面部细节（甚至是眼睛、嘴巴和胡须）方面表现出优越性。此外，通过插入输入的形状、表情和外观代码，可以轻松实现连续的面部变形。通过引入特定于身份的调制和纹理编码器，我们的模型合成了准确的光度细节并表现出强大的表示能力。我们的模型在多种应用上表现出强大的能力，包括基于图像的拟合、随机生成、面部绑定、面部编辑和新颖的视图合成。实验表明，我们的方法比以前的参数模型具有更高的表示能力，并在多个应用中实现了有竞争力的性能。据我们所知，我们的工作是第一个基于神经辐射场构建的面部参数模型，可用于拟合、生成和操作。代码和数据可在https://github.com/zhuhao-nju/mofanerf获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经辐射场（NeRF）的参数化面部模型MoFaNeRF，用于生成和操作高保真面部图像。
AI.motivation: 传统3D形态模型（3DMM）在合成面部细节（如眼睛、嘴巴）时存在不足，需直接生成逼真图像并支持连续面部形态变化。
AI.method: 通过将编码的面部形状、表情、外观参数与空间坐标及视角方向输入MLP，输出空间点的辐射值。引入身份特定调制和纹理编码器提升细节准确性。
AI.result: 在图像拟合、随机生成、面部编辑等任务中表现优于现有参数化模型，首次实现基于NeRF的面部参数化模型应用。
AI.conclusion: MoFaNeRF是首个基于NeRF的面部参数化模型，可有效用于拟合、生成及面部操作，代码和数据已开源。

authors_text: Cho-Ying Wu,Jialiang Wang,Michael Hall,Ulrich Neumann,Shuochen Su
title: Toward Practical Monocular Indoor Depth Estimation
title_zh: 走向实用的单目室内深度估计
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2022
abstract: The majority of prior monocular depth estimation methods without groundtruth depth guidance focus on driving scenarios. We show that such methods generalize poorly to unseen complex indoor scenes, where objects are cluttered and arbitrarily arranged in the near field. To obtain more robustness, we propose a structure distillation approach to learn knacks from an off-the-shelf relative depth estimator that produces structured but metric-agnostic depth. By combining structure distillation with a branch that learns metrics from left-right consistency, we attain structured and metric depth for generic indoor scenes and make inferences in real-time. To facilitate learning and evaluation, we collect SimSIN, a dataset from simulation with thousands of environments, and UniSIN, a dataset that contains about 500 real scan sequences of generic indoor environments. We experiment in both sim-to-real and real-to-real settings, and show improvements, as well as in downstream applications using our depth maps. This work provides a full study, covering methods, data, and applications aspects.
summary: The majority of prior monocular depth estimation methods without groundtruth depth guidance focus on driving scenarios. We show that such methods generalize poorly to unseen complex indoor scenes, where objects are cluttered and arbitrarily arranged in the near field. To obtain more robustness, we propose a structure distillation approach to learn knacks from an off-the-shelf relative depth estimator that produces structured but metric-agnostic depth. By combining structure distillation with a branch that learns metrics from left-right consistency, we attain structured and metric depth for generic indoor scenes and make inferences in real-time. To facilitate learning and evaluation, we collect SimSIN, a dataset from simulation with thousands of environments, and UniSIN, a dataset that contains about 500 real scan sequences of generic indoor environments. We experiment in both sim-to-real and real-to-real settings, and show improvements, as well as in downstream applications using our depth maps. This work provides a full study, covering methods, data, and applications aspects.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的没有地面实况深度指导的单目深度估计方法都集中在驾驶场景上。我们表明，这种方法对于看不见的复杂室内场景的泛化能力很差，其中物体在近场中杂乱且任意排列。为了获得更强的鲁棒性，我们提出了一种结构蒸馏方法，从现成的相对深度估计器中学习技巧，该估计器产生结构化但与度量无关的深度。通过将结构蒸馏与从左右一致性学习度量的分支相结合，我们获得了通用室内场景的结构化和度量深度，并实时进行推理。为了便于学习和评估，我们收集了 SimSIN（来自数千个环境的模拟数据集）和 UniSIN（包含约 500 个通用室内环境的真实扫描序列的数据集）。我们在模拟到真实和真实到真实的设置中进行实验，并展示改进，以及使用我们的深度图的下游应用程序。这项工作提供了全面的研究，涵盖方法、数据和应用方面。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决单目深度估计在复杂室内场景中的泛化问题，提出结构蒸馏方法并构建数据集以实现实用化室内深度估计。
AI.motivation: 现有单目深度估计方法多针对驾驶场景，在复杂室内场景中因物体杂乱且近场排列任意而泛化性差，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出结构蒸馏方法从相对深度估计器学习结构信息，并结合左右一致性分支学习度量信息；构建SimSIN和UniSIN数据集辅助训练与评估。
AI.result: 方法在模拟与真实场景中均取得改进效果，支持实时推理，并在下游应用中验证了深度图的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文系统研究了方法、数据与应用，为实用化单目室内深度估计提供了完整方案。

authors_text: Rukiye Savran Kiziltepe,Lorin Sweeney,Mihai Gabriel Constantin,Faiyaz Doctor,Alba Garcia Seco de Herrera,Claire-Helene Demarty,Graham Healy,Bogdan Ionescu,Alan F. Smeaton
title: An Annotated Video Dataset for Computing Video Memorability
title_zh: 用于计算视频记忆性的带注释的视频数据集
comment: 11 pages
comments: 11 pages
abstract: Using a collection of publicly available links to short form video clips of an average of 6 seconds duration each, 1,275 users manually annotated each video multiple times to indicate both long-term and short-term memorability of the videos. The annotations were gathered as part of an online memory game and measured a participant's ability to recall having seen the video previously when shown a collection of videos. The recognition tasks were performed on videos seen within the previous few minutes for short-term memorability and within the previous 24 to 72 hours for long-term memorability. Data includes the reaction times for each recognition of each video. Associated with each video are text descriptions (captions) as well as a collection of image-level features applied to 3 frames extracted from each video (start, middle and end). Video-level features are also provided. The dataset was used in the Video Memorability task as part of the MediaEval benchmark in 2020.
summary: Using a collection of publicly available links to short form video clips of an average of 6 seconds duration each, 1,275 users manually annotated each video multiple times to indicate both long-term and short-term memorability of the videos. The annotations were gathered as part of an online memory game and measured a participant's ability to recall having seen the video previously when shown a collection of videos. The recognition tasks were performed on videos seen within the previous few minutes for short-term memorability and within the previous 24 to 72 hours for long-term memorability. Data includes the reaction times for each recognition of each video. Associated with each video are text descriptions (captions) as well as a collection of image-level features applied to 3 frames extracted from each video (start, middle and end). Video-level features are also provided. The dataset was used in the Video Memorability task as part of the MediaEval benchmark in 2020.
abstract_zh: 1,275 名用户使用一组平均每个持续时间为 6 秒的短视频片段的公开链接，对每个视频进行了多次手动注释，以表明视频的长期和短期记忆力。这些注释是作为在线记忆游戏的一部分收集的，并测量了参与者在观看一系列视频时回忆起以前看过该视频的能力。针对短期记忆，对前几分钟内看过的视频进行识别任务；针对长期记忆，对过去 24 至 72 小时内看过的视频进行识别任务。数据包括每个视频的每次识别的反应时间。与每个视频相关的是文本描述（标题）以及应用于从每个视频（开始、中间和结束）提取的 3 帧的图像级特征集合。还提供视频级功能。该数据集作为 2020 年 MediaEval 基准的一部分用于视频记忆任务。

AI.tldr: 该论文构建了一个包含视频记忆性标注的数据集，用于研究视频的短期和长期记忆能力。
AI.motivation: 缺乏针对视频记忆性研究的标准化数据集，需通过大规模用户标注和多维度特征分析视频记忆性影响因素。
AI.method: 通过在线记忆游戏收集1275名用户对短视频的多次标注，提取图像级（关键帧特征）和视频级特征，并记录反应时间。
AI.result: 数据集被用于MediaEval 2020的Video Memorability任务，为视频记忆性研究提供了基准数据和特征分析基础。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为视频记忆性建模、特征分析及算法评估提供了重要资源，推动了多媒体记忆研究领域的发展。

search_text: An Annotated Video Dataset for Computing Video Memorability 用于计算视频记忆性的带注释的视频数据集 Using a collection of publicly available links to short form video clips of an average of 6 seconds duration each, 1,275 users manually annotated each video multiple times to indicate both long-term and short-term memorability of the videos. The annotations were gathered as part of an online memory game and measured a participant's ability to recall having seen the video previously when shown a collection of videos. The recognition tasks were performed on videos seen within the previous few minutes for short-term memorability and within the previous 24 to 72 hours for long-term memorability. Data includes the reaction times for each recognition of each video. Associated with each video are text descriptions (captions) as well as a collection of image-level features applied to 3 frames extracted from each video (start, middle and end). Video-level features are also provided. The dataset was used in the Video Memorability task as part of the MediaEval benchmark in 2020. 1,275 名用户使用一组平均每个持续时间为 6 秒的短视频片段的公开链接，对每个视频进行了多次手动注释，以表明视频的长期和短期记忆力。这些注释是作为在线记忆游戏的一部分收集的，并测量了参与者在观看一系列视频时回忆起以前看过该视频的能力。针对短期记忆，对前几分钟内看过的视频进行识别任务；针对长期记忆，对过去 24 至 72 小时内看过的视频进行识别任务。数据包括每个视频的每次识别的反应时间。与每个视频相关的是文本描述（标题）以及应用于从每个视频（开始、中间和结束）提取的 3 帧的图像级特征集合。还提供视频级功能。该数据集作为 2020 年 MediaEval 基准的一部分用于视频记忆任务。 该论文构建了一个包含视频记忆性标注的数据集，用于研究视频的短期和长期记忆能力。 Rukiye Savran Kiziltepe,Lorin Sweeney,Mihai Gabriel Constantin,Faiyaz Doctor,Alba Garcia Seco de Herrera,Claire-Helene Demarty,Graham Healy,Bogdan Ionescu,Alan F. authors_text: Sivan Harary,Eli Schwartz,Assaf Arbelle,Peter Staar,Shady Abu-Hussein,Elad Amrani,Roei Herzig,Amit Alfassy,Raja Giryes,Hilde Kuehne,Dina Katabi,Kate Saenko,Rogerio Feris,Leonid Karlinsky
title: Unsupervised Domain Generalization by Learning a Bridge Across Domains
title_zh: 通过学习跨域桥梁实现无监督域泛化
abstract: The ability to generalize learned representations across significantly different visual domains, such as between real photos, clipart, paintings, and sketches, is a fundamental capacity of the human visual system. In this paper, different from most cross-domain works that utilize some (or full) source domain supervision, we approach a relatively new and very practical Unsupervised Domain Generalization (UDG) setup of having no training supervision in neither source nor target domains. Our approach is based on self-supervised learning of a Bridge Across Domains (BrAD) - an auxiliary bridge domain accompanied by a set of semantics preserving visual (image-to-image) mappings to BrAD from each of the training domains. The BrAD and mappings to it are learned jointly (end-to-end) with a contrastive self-supervised representation model that semantically aligns each of the domains to its BrAD-projection, and hence implicitly drives all the domains (seen or unseen) to semantically align to each other. In this work, we show how using an edge-regularized BrAD our approach achieves significant gains across multiple benchmarks and a range of tasks, including UDG, Few-shot UDA, and unsupervised generalization across multi-domain datasets (including generalization to unseen domains and classes).
summary: The ability to generalize learned representations across significantly different visual domains, such as between real photos, clipart, paintings, and sketches, is a fundamental capacity of the human visual system. In this paper, different from most cross-domain works that utilize some (or full) source domain supervision, we approach a relatively new and very practical Unsupervised Domain Generalization (UDG) setup of having no training supervision in neither source nor target domains. Our approach is based on self-supervised learning of a Bridge Across Domains (BrAD) - an auxiliary bridge domain accompanied by a set of semantics preserving visual (image-to-image) mappings to BrAD from each of the training domains. The BrAD and mappings to it are learned jointly (end-to-end) with a contrastive self-supervised representation model that semantically aligns each of the domains to its BrAD-projection, and hence implicitly drives all the domains (seen or unseen) to semantically align to each other. In this work, we show how using an edge-regularized BrAD our approach achieves significant gains across multiple benchmarks and a range of tasks, including UDG, Few-shot UDA, and unsupervised generalization across multi-domain datasets (including generalization to unseen domains and classes).
abstract_zh: 在明显不同的视觉领域（例如真实照片、剪贴画、绘画和草图）之间概括学习表征的能力是人类视觉系统的基本能力。在本文中，与大多数利用部分（或全部）源域监督的跨域工作不同，我们采用了一种相对较新且非常实用的无监督域泛化（UDG）设置，即在源域和目标域中都没有训练监督。我们的方法基于跨域桥接 (BrAD) 的自监督学习 - 一个辅助桥接域，伴随着一组语义，保留从每个训练域到 Br​​AD 的视觉（图像到图像）映射。 BrAD 及其映射是通过对比自监督表示模型联合（端到端）学习的，该模型在语义上将每个域与其 BrAD 投影对齐，从而隐式驱动所有域（可见或不可见）在语义上彼此对齐。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何使用边缘正则化 BrAD，我们的方法在多个基准测试和一系列任务中取得显着收益，包括 UDG、Few-shot UDA 和跨多域数据集的无监督泛化（包括泛化到不可见的域和类）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督域泛化方法，通过构建跨域桥梁（BrAD）实现不同视觉域间的语义对齐。
AI.motivation: 传统跨域方法依赖源域监督，而实际场景中常缺乏标签。本文旨在解决无监督域泛化（UDG）问题，使模型在无监督条件下适应新域。
AI.method: 设计自监督学习框架，引入辅助桥梁域（BrAD）并学习各训练域到BrAD的语义映射，通过对比学习对齐域间语义，结合边缘正则化优化桥梁域表示。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中显著优于现有方法，有效提升UDG、少样本UDA及跨多域数据集的无监督泛化性能，包括对未见域和类别的适应能力。
AI.conclusion: BrAD方法通过跨域语义对齐实现强泛化能力，为无监督域适应提供了新思路，适用于多任务和多域场景。

title: Ablation study of self-supervised learning for image classification
title_zh: 图像分类自监督学习的消融研究
abstract: This project focuses on the self-supervised training of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and transformer networks for the task of image recognition. A simple siamese network with different backbones is used in order to maximize the similarity of two augmented transformed images from the same source image. In this way, the backbone is able to learn visual information without supervision. Finally, the method is evaluated on three image recognition datasets.
summary: This project focuses on the self-supervised training of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and transformer networks for the task of image recognition. A simple siamese network with different backbones is used in order to maximize the similarity of two augmented transformed images from the same source image. In this way, the backbone is able to learn visual information without supervision. Finally, the method is evaluated on three image recognition datasets.
abstract_zh: 该项目重点关注用于图像识别任务的卷积神经网络（CNN）和变压器网络的自监督训练。使用具有不同主干的简单暹罗网络来最大化来自同一源图像的两个增强变换图像的相似性。通过这种方式，主干网络能够在没有监督的情况下学习视觉信息。最后，在三个图像识别数据集上对该方法进行了评估。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了自监督学习在图像分类任务中使用卷积神经网络（CNN）和Transformer网络的效果，通过Siamese网络结构进行消融实验。
AI.motivation: 探索自监督学习在不同网络架构（CNN与Transformer）中的有效性，以提升图像分类任务中模型的视觉表征能力。
AI.method: 采用Siamese网络框架，利用同一图像的两种增强版本最大化相似性，通过对比学习训练CNN和Transformer的主干网络，并在三个图像识别数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 验证了自监督学习方法在不同网络结构上的可行性，并通过消融实验分析了各组件对性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习能够有效训练视觉模型，不同网络架构（CNN/Transformer）在该任务中表现出差异性，需根据具体场景选择合适结构。

method: 采用Siamese网络框架，利用同一图像的两种增强版本最大化相似性，通过对比学习训练CNN和Transformer的主干网络，并在三个图像识别数据集上进行评估。
result: 验证了自监督学习方法在不同网络结构上的可行性，并通过消融实验分析了各组件对性能的影响。
conclusion: 自监督学习能够有效训练视觉模型，不同网络架构（CNN/Transformer）在该任务中表现出差异性，需根据具体场景选择合适结构。
search_text: Ablation study of self-supervised learning for image classification 图像分类自监督学习的消融研究 This project focuses on the self-supervised training of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and transformer networks for the task of image recognition. A simple siamese network with different backbones is used in order to maximize the similarity of two augmented transformed images from the same source image. In this way, the backbone is able to learn visual information without supervision. Finally, the method is evaluated on three image recognition datasets. 该项目重点关注用于图像识别任务的卷积神经网络（CNN）和变压器网络的自监督训练。使用具有不同主干的简单暹罗网络来最大化来自同一源图像的两个增强变换图像的相似性。通过这种方式，主干网络能够在没有监督的情况下学习视觉信息。最后，在三个图像识别数据集上对该方法进行了评估。 该论文研究了自监督学习在图像分类任务中使用卷积神经网络（CNN）和Transformer网络的效果，通过Siamese网络结构进行消融实验。 Ilias Papastratis cs.CV

title: Interactive Disentanglement: Learning Concepts by Interacting with their Prototype Representations
title_zh: 交互式解开：通过与原型表示交互来学习概念
comment: To be published in Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2022
comments: To be published in Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2022
abstract: Learning visual concepts from raw images without strong supervision is a challenging task. In this work, we show the advantages of prototype representations for understanding and revising the latent space of neural concept learners. For this purpose, we introduce interactive Concept Swapping Networks (iCSNs), a novel framework for learning concept-grounded representations via weak supervision and implicit prototype representations. iCSNs learn to bind conceptual information to specific prototype slots by swapping the latent representations of paired images. This semantically grounded and discrete latent space facilitates human understanding and human-machine interaction. We support this claim by conducting experiments on our novel data set "Elementary Concept Reasoning" (ECR), focusing on visual concepts shared by geometric objects.
summary: Learning visual concepts from raw images without strong supervision is a challenging task. In this work, we show the advantages of prototype representations for understanding and revising the latent space of neural concept learners. For this purpose, we introduce interactive Concept Swapping Networks (iCSNs), a novel framework for learning concept-grounded representations via weak supervision and implicit prototype representations. iCSNs learn to bind conceptual information to specific prototype slots by swapping the latent representations of paired images. This semantically grounded and discrete latent space facilitates human understanding and human-machine interaction. We support this claim by conducting experiments on our novel data set "Elementary Concept Reasoning" (ECR), focusing on visual concepts shared by geometric objects.
abstract_zh: 在没有强有力监督的情况下从原始图像中学习视觉概念是一项具有挑战性的任务。在这项工作中，我们展示了原型表示在理解和修改神经概念学习者的潜在空间方面的优势。为此，我们引入了交互式概念交换网络（iCSN），这是一种通过弱监督和隐式原型表示来学习基于概念的表示的新颖框架。 iCSN 通过交换成对图像的潜在表示来学习将概念信息绑定到特定的原型槽。这种语义基础和离散的潜在空间有利于人类理解和人机交互。我们通过对我们的新颖数据集“基本概念推理”（ECR）进行实验来支持这一说法，重点关注几何对象共享的视觉概念。

AI.tldr: 本文提出交互式概念解耦框架iCSN，通过原型表示学习视觉概念，无需强监督即可理解并修正潜在空间。
AI.motivation: 从原始图像中学习视觉概念缺乏强监督，传统方法难以实现人类可理解的潜在空间表示，需探索弱监督下概念与原型的绑定机制。
AI.method: 设计交互式概念交换网络(iCSN)，通过交换配对图像的潜在表示，将概念信息绑定到特定原型槽位，构建语义化离散潜在空间。
AI.result: 在几何对象共享概念的ECR数据集上验证，iCSN有效提升了人类对潜在空间的理解与人机交互能力，证明了原型表示的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 交互式解耦方法通过原型表示实现了概念导向的潜在空间学习，为弱监督下的视觉概念理解提供了新思路。

authors_text: Haobo Ji,Xin Feng,Wenjie Pei,Jinxing Li,Guangming Lu
title: U2-Former: A Nested U-shaped Transformer for Image Restoration
title_zh: U2-Former：用于图像恢复的嵌套 U 形变压器
abstract: While Transformer has achieved remarkable performance in various high-level vision tasks, it is still challenging to exploit the full potential of Transformer in image restoration. The crux lies in the limited depth of applying Transformer in the typical encoder-decoder framework for image restoration, resulting from heavy self-attention computation load and inefficient communications across different depth (scales) of layers. In this paper, we present a deep and effective Transformer-based network for image restoration, termed as U2-Former, which is able to employ Transformer as the core operation to perform image restoration in a deep encoding and decoding space. Specifically, it leverages the nested U-shaped structure to facilitate the interactions across different layers with different scales of feature maps. Furthermore, we optimize the computational efficiency for the basic Transformer block by introducing a feature-filtering mechanism to compress the token representation. Apart from the typical supervision ways for image restoration, our U2-Former also performs contrastive learning in multiple aspects to further decouple the noise component from the background image. Extensive experiments on various image restoration tasks, including reflection removal, rain streak removal and dehazing respectively, demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed U2-Former.
summary: While Transformer has achieved remarkable performance in various high-level vision tasks, it is still challenging to exploit the full potential of Transformer in image restoration. The crux lies in the limited depth of applying Transformer in the typical encoder-decoder framework for image restoration, resulting from heavy self-attention computation load and inefficient communications across different depth (scales) of layers. In this paper, we present a deep and effective Transformer-based network for image restoration, termed as U2-Former, which is able to employ Transformer as the core operation to perform image restoration in a deep encoding and decoding space. Specifically, it leverages the nested U-shaped structure to facilitate the interactions across different layers with different scales of feature maps. Furthermore, we optimize the computational efficiency for the basic Transformer block by introducing a feature-filtering mechanism to compress the token representation. Apart from the typical supervision ways for image restoration, our U2-Former also performs contrastive learning in multiple aspects to further decouple the noise component from the background image. Extensive experiments on various image restoration tasks, including reflection removal, rain streak removal and dehazing respectively, demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed U2-Former.
abstract_zh: 虽然 Transformer 在各种高级视觉任务中取得了卓越的性能，但要充分发挥 Transformer 在图像恢复方面的潜力仍然具有挑战性。问题的关键在于，在典型的图像恢复编码器-解码器框架中应用 Transformer 的深度有限，这是由于自注意力计算负载过重以及不同深度（尺度）层之间的低效通信造成的。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的深度且有效的图像恢复网络，称为 U2-Former，它能够采用 Transformer 作为核心操作在深度编码和解码空间中执行图像恢复。具体来说，它利用嵌套的 U 形结构来促进具有不同比例特征图的不同层之间的交互。此外，我们通过引入特征过滤机制来压缩令牌表示来优化基本 Transformer 块的计算效率。除了典型的图像恢复监督方式外，我们的U2-Former还进行多个方面的对比学习，以进一步将噪声成分与背景图像解耦。对各种图像恢复任务（包括反射去除、雨纹去除和去雾）的广泛实验证明了所提出的 U2-Former 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为U2-Former的嵌套U型Transformer网络，用于图像修复任务，如去雨、去雾和反射去除。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在高层视觉任务中表现出色，但其在图像修复中的深度应用受限于自注意力计算量大和跨层通信效率低的问题。
AI.method: 设计嵌套U型结构促进多尺度特征交互，并引入特征过滤机制压缩token表示以提升计算效率，同时通过多方面的对比学习分离噪声与背景图像。
AI.result: 在反射去除、雨迹去除和去雾等任务上的实验表明，U2-Former在修复效果上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: U2-Former通过深度编码解码空间和优化计算效率，有效解决了Transformer在图像修复中的关键挑战。

The crux lies in the limited depth of applying Transformer in the typical encoder-decoder framework for image restoration, resulting from heavy self-attention computation load and inefficient communications across different depth (scales) of layers. In this paper, we present a deep and effective Transformer-based network for image restoration, termed as U2-Former, which is able to employ Transformer as the core operation to perform image restoration in a deep encoding and decoding space. Specifically, it leverages the nested U-shaped structure to facilitate the interactions across different layers with different scales of feature maps. Furthermore, we optimize the computational efficiency for the basic Transformer block by introducing a feature-filtering mechanism to compress the token representation. Apart from the typical supervision ways for image restoration, our U2-Former also performs contrastive learning in multiple aspects to further decouple the noise component from the background image. Extensive experiments on various image restoration tasks, including reflection removal, rain streak removal and dehazing respectively, demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed U2-Former. 虽然 Transformer 在各种高级视觉任务中取得了卓越的性能，但要充分发挥 Transformer 在图像恢复方面的潜力仍然具有挑战性。问题的关键在于，在典型的图像恢复编码器-解码器框架中应用 Transformer 的深度有限，这是由于自注意力计算负载过重以及不同深度（尺度）层之间的低效通信造成的。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的深度且有效的图像恢复网络，称为 U2-Former，它能够采用 Transformer 作为核心操作在深度编码和解码空间中执行图像恢复。具体来说，它利用嵌套的 U 形结构来促进具有不同比例特征图的不同层之间的交互。此外，我们通过引入特征过滤机制来压缩令牌表示来优化基本 Transformer 块的计算效率。除了典型的图像恢复监督方式外，我们的U2-Former还进行多个方面的对比学习，以进一步将噪声成分与背景图像解耦。对各种图像恢复任务（包括反射去除、雨纹去除和去雾）的广泛实验证明了所提出的 U2-Former 的有效性。 本文提出了一种名为U2-Former的嵌套U型Transformer网络，用于图像修复任务，如去雨、去雾和反射去除。 Haobo Ji,Xin Feng,Wenjie Pei,Jinxing Li,Guangming Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Jia-Fong Yeh,Chi-Ming Chung,Hung-Ting Su,Yi-Ting Chen,Winston H. Hsu
title: Stage Conscious Attention Network (SCAN) : A Demonstration-Conditioned Policy for Few-Shot Imitation
title_zh: 阶段意识注意网络（SCAN）：少镜头模仿的示范条件策略
comment: Accepted by AAAI 2022, preprint version, first two authors contribute equally
comments: Accepted by AAAI 2022, preprint version, first two authors contribute equally
abstract: In few-shot imitation learning (FSIL), using behavioral cloning (BC) to solve unseen tasks with few expert demonstrations becomes a popular research direction. The following capabilities are essential in robotics applications: (1) Behaving in compound tasks that contain multiple stages. (2) Retrieving knowledge from few length-variant and misalignment demonstrations. (3) Learning from a different expert. No previous work can achieve these abilities at the same time. In this work, we conduct FSIL problem under the union of above settings and introduce a novel stage conscious attention network (SCAN) to retrieve knowledge from few demonstrations simultaneously. SCAN uses an attention module to identify each stage in length-variant demonstrations. Moreover, it is designed under demonstration-conditioned policy that learns the relationship between experts and agents. Experiment results show that SCAN can learn from different experts without fine-tuning and outperform baselines in complicated compound tasks with explainable visualization.
summary: In few-shot imitation learning (FSIL), using behavioral cloning (BC) to solve unseen tasks with few expert demonstrations becomes a popular research direction. The following capabilities are essential in robotics applications: (1) Behaving in compound tasks that contain multiple stages. (2) Retrieving knowledge from few length-variant and misalignment demonstrations. (3) Learning from a different expert. No previous work can achieve these abilities at the same time. In this work, we conduct FSIL problem under the union of above settings and introduce a novel stage conscious attention network (SCAN) to retrieve knowledge from few demonstrations simultaneously. SCAN uses an attention module to identify each stage in length-variant demonstrations. Moreover, it is designed under demonstration-conditioned policy that learns the relationship between experts and agents. Experiment results show that SCAN can learn from different experts without fine-tuning and outperform baselines in complicated compound tasks with explainable visualization.
abstract_zh: 在少样本模仿学习（FSIL）中，利用行为克隆（BC）在很少有专家演示的情况下解决看不见的任务成为一个流行的研究方向。以下功能在机器人应用中至关重要： (1) 执行包含多个阶段的复合任务。 (2) 从少数长度变化和错位演示中检索知识。 (3)向不同的专家学习。以前的工作无法同时实现这些能力。在这项工作中，我们在上述设置的结合下解决了 FSIL 问题，并引入了一种新颖的阶段意识注意网络（SCAN）来同时从少量演示中检索知识。 SCAN 使用注意力模块来识别长度变化演示中的每个阶段。此外，它是在学习专家和代理之间关系的示范条件策略下设计的。实验结果表明，SCAN 可以向不同的专家学习，无需微调，并且在复杂的复合任务中通过可解释的可视化超越基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SCAN的新型网络，用于解决少样本模仿学习中的多阶段复合任务、处理长度不一致演示及跨专家学习的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法同时满足机器人应用中处理多阶段任务、从少量不一致演示中学习以及跨专家适应的需求，需设计统一框架解决这些问题。
AI.method: SCAN通过注意力模块识别多阶段演示中的关键阶段，并采用演示条件策略学习专家与智能体之间的关系，无需微调即可适应不同专家。
AI.result: 实验表明SCAN在复杂复合任务中优于基线方法，且通过可视化解释其学习过程，能有效处理不同长度和对齐方式的演示数据。
AI.conclusion: SCAN通过结合阶段感知注意力与演示条件策略，实现了少样本模仿学习中多目标的统一解决，为机器人应用提供了新思路。

search_text: Stage Conscious Attention Network (SCAN) : A Demonstration-Conditioned Policy for Few-Shot Imitation 阶段意识注意网络（SCAN）：少镜头模仿的示范条件策略 In few-shot imitation learning (FSIL), using behavioral cloning (BC) to solve unseen tasks with few expert demonstrations becomes a popular research direction. The following capabilities are essential in robotics applications: (1) Behaving in compound tasks that contain multiple stages. (2) Retrieving knowledge from few length-variant and misalignment demonstrations. (3) Learning from a different expert. No previous work can achieve these abilities at the same time. In this work, we conduct FSIL problem under the union of above settings and introduce a novel stage conscious attention network (SCAN) to retrieve knowledge from few demonstrations simultaneously. SCAN uses an attention module to identify each stage in length-variant demonstrations. Moreover, it is designed under demonstration-conditioned policy that learns the relationship between experts and agents. Experiment results show that SCAN can learn from different experts without fine-tuning and outperform baselines in complicated compound tasks with explainable visualization. 在少样本模仿学习（FSIL）中，利用行为克隆（BC）在很少有专家演示的情况下解决看不见的任务成为一个流行的研究方向。以下功能在机器人应用中至关重要： (1) 执行包含多个阶段的复合任务。 (2) 从少数长度变化和错位演示中检索知识。 (3)向不同的专家学习。以前的工作无法同时实现这些能力。在这项工作中，我们在上述设置的结合下解决了 FSIL 问题，并引入了一种新颖的阶段意识注意网络（SCAN）来同时从少量演示中检索知识。 SCAN 使用注意力模块来识别长度变化演示中的每个阶段。此外，它是在学习专家和代理之间关系的示范条件策略下设计的。实验结果表明，SCAN 可以向不同的专家学习，无需微调，并且在复杂的复合任务中通过可解释的可视化超越基线。 本文提出了一种名为SCAN的新型网络，用于解决少样本模仿学习中的多阶段复合任务、处理长度不一致演示及跨专家学习的挑战。 Jia-Fong Yeh,Chi-Ming Chung,Hung-Ting Su,Yi-Ting Chen,Winston H. Hsu cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Xiaoxiao Yang,Yeqian Qiang,Huijie Zhu,Chunxiang Wang,Ming Yang
title: BAANet: Learning Bi-directional Adaptive Attention Gates for Multispectral Pedestrian Detection
title_zh: BAANet：学习用于多光谱行人检测的双向自适应注意力门
abstract: Thermal infrared (TIR) image has proven effectiveness in providing temperature cues to the RGB features for multispectral pedestrian detection. Most existing methods directly inject the TIR modality into the RGB-based framework or simply ensemble the results of two modalities. This, however, could lead to inferior detection performance, as the RGB and TIR features generally have modality-specific noise, which might worsen the features along with the propagation of the network. Therefore, this work proposes an effective and efficient cross-modality fusion module called Bi-directional Adaptive Attention Gate (BAA-Gate). Based on the attention mechanism, the BAA-Gate is devised to distill the informative features and recalibrate the representations asymptotically. Concretely, a bi-direction multi-stage fusion strategy is adopted to progressively optimize features of two modalities and retain their specificity during the propagation. Moreover, an adaptive interaction of BAA-Gate is introduced by the illumination-based weighting strategy to adaptively adjust the recalibrating and aggregating strength in the BAA-Gate and enhance the robustness towards illumination changes. Considerable experiments on the challenging KAIST dataset demonstrate the superior performance of our method with satisfactory speed.
summary: Thermal infrared (TIR) image has proven effectiveness in providing temperature cues to the RGB features for multispectral pedestrian detection. Most existing methods directly inject the TIR modality into the RGB-based framework or simply ensemble the results of two modalities. This, however, could lead to inferior detection performance, as the RGB and TIR features generally have modality-specific noise, which might worsen the features along with the propagation of the network. Therefore, this work proposes an effective and efficient cross-modality fusion module called Bi-directional Adaptive Attention Gate (BAA-Gate). Based on the attention mechanism, the BAA-Gate is devised to distill the informative features and recalibrate the representations asymptotically. Concretely, a bi-direction multi-stage fusion strategy is adopted to progressively optimize features of two modalities and retain their specificity during the propagation. Moreover, an adaptive interaction of BAA-Gate is introduced by the illumination-based weighting strategy to adaptively adjust the recalibrating and aggregating strength in the BAA-Gate and enhance the robustness towards illumination changes. Considerable experiments on the challenging KAIST dataset demonstrate the superior performance of our method with satisfactory speed.
abstract_zh: 热红外 (TIR) 图像已被证明可以有效地为多光谱行人检测的 RGB 特征提供温度提示。大多数现有方法直接将 TIR 模态注入到基于 RGB 的框架中，或者简单地集成两种模态的结果。然而，这可能会导致检测性能较差，因为 RGB 和 TIR 特征通常具有特定于模态的噪声，这可能会随着网络的传播而使特征恶化。因此，这项工作提出了一种有效且高效的跨模态融合模块，称为双向自适应注意门（BAA-Gate）。基于注意力机制，BAA-Gate 被设计来提取信息特征并渐进地重新校准表示。具体来说，采用双向多阶段融合策略来逐步优化两种模态的特征并在传播过程中保留其特异性。此外，通过基于照明的加权策略引入了BAA-Gate的自适应交互，以自适应地调整BAA-Gate中的重新校准和聚合强度，并增强对照明变化的鲁棒性。在具有挑战性的 KAIST 数据集上进行的大量实验证明了我们的方法具有令人满意的速度的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BAANet，通过双向自适应注意力门机制实现多光谱行人检测中RGB与热红外模态的有效融合。
AI.motivation: 现有方法直接融合RGB与热红外模态易受模态特异性噪声干扰，导致特征退化和检测性能下降，需设计更鲁棒的跨模态融合机制。
AI.method: 提出双向自适应注意力门（BAA-Gate），采用多阶段双向融合策略渐进优化特征，并通过光照加权策略自适应调整特征重校准强度。
AI.result: 在KAIST数据集上实验表明，该方法在保持检测速度的同时显著优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: BAA-Gate通过自适应跨模态特征交互机制，有效提升了多光谱行人检测的鲁棒性与准确性。
