Most existing methods directly inject the TIR modality into the RGB-based framework or simply ensemble the results of two modalities. This, however, could lead to inferior detection performance, as the RGB and TIR features generally have modality-specific noise, which might worsen the features along with the propagation of the network. Therefore, this work proposes an effective and efficient cross-modality fusion module called Bi-directional Adaptive Attention Gate (BAA-Gate). Based on the attention mechanism, the BAA-Gate is devised to distill the informative features and recalibrate the representations asymptotically. Concretely, a bi-direction multi-stage fusion strategy is adopted to progressively optimize features of two modalities and retain their specificity during the propagation. Moreover, an adaptive interaction of BAA-Gate is introduced by the illumination-based weighting strategy to adaptively adjust the recalibrating and aggregating strength in the BAA-Gate and enhance the robustness towards illumination changes. Considerable experiments on the challenging KAIST dataset demonstrate the superior performance of our method with satisfactory speed. 热红外 (TIR) 图像已被证明可以有效地为多光谱行人检测的 RGB 特征提供温度提示。大多数现有方法直接将 TIR 模态注入到基于 RGB 的框架中，或者简单地集成两种模态的结果。然而，这可能会导致检测性能较差，因为 RGB 和 TIR 特征通常具有特定于模态的噪声，这可能会随着网络的传播而使特征恶化。因此，这项工作提出了一种有效且高效的跨模态融合模块，称为双向自适应注意门（BAA-Gate）。基于注意力机制，BAA-Gate 被设计来提取信息特征并渐进地重新校准表示。具体来说，采用双向多阶段融合策略来逐步优化两种模态的特征并在传播过程中保留其特异性。此外，通过基于照明的加权策略引入了BAA-Gate的自适应交互，以自适应地调整BAA-Gate中的重新校准和聚合强度，并增强对照明变化的鲁棒性。在具有挑战性的 KAIST 数据集上进行的大量实验证明了我们的方法具有令人满意的速度的卓越性能。 本文提出BAANet，通过双向自适应注意力门机制实现多光谱行人检测中RGB与热红外模态的有效融合。 Xiaoxiao Yang,Yeqian Qiang,Huijie Zhu,Chunxiang Wang,Ming Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Bowen Hao,Hongzhi Yin,Jing Zhang,Cuiping Li,Hong Chen
title: A Multi-Strategy based Pre-Training Method for Cold-Start Recommendation
title_zh: 一种基于多策略的冷启动推荐预训练方法
abstract: Cold-start problem is a fundamental challenge for recommendation tasks. The recent self-supervised learning (SSL) on Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) model, PT-GNN, pre-trains the GNN model to reconstruct the cold-start embeddings and has shown great potential for cold-start recommendation. However, due to the over-smoothing problem, PT-GNN can only capture up to 3-order relation, which can not provide much useful auxiliary information to depict the target cold-start user or item. Besides, the embedding reconstruction task only considers the intra-correlations within the subgraph of users and items, while ignoring the inter-correlations across different subgraphs. To solve the above challenges, we propose a multi-strategy based pre-training method for cold-start recommendation (MPT), which extends PT-GNN from the perspective of model architecture and pretext tasks to improve the cold-start recommendation performance. Specifically, in terms of the model architecture, in addition to the short-range dependencies of users and items captured by the GNN encoder, we introduce a Transformer encoder to capture long-range dependencies. In terms of the pretext task, in addition to considering the intra-correlations of users and items by the embedding reconstruction task, we add embedding contrastive learning task to capture inter-correlations of users and items. We train the GNN and Transformer encoders on these pretext tasks under the meta-learning setting to simulate the real cold-start scenario, making the model easily and rapidly being adapted to new cold-start users and items. Experiments on three public recommendation datasets show the superiority of the proposed MPT model against the vanilla GNN models, the pre-training GNN model on user/item embedding inference and the recommendation task.
summary: Cold-start problem is a fundamental challenge for recommendation tasks. The recent self-supervised learning (SSL) on Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) model, PT-GNN, pre-trains the GNN model to reconstruct the cold-start embeddings and has shown great potential for cold-start recommendation. However, due to the over-smoothing problem, PT-GNN can only capture up to 3-order relation, which can not provide much useful auxiliary information to depict the target cold-start user or item. Besides, the embedding reconstruction task only considers the intra-correlations within the subgraph of users and items, while ignoring the inter-correlations across different subgraphs. To solve the above challenges, we propose a multi-strategy based pre-training method for cold-start recommendation (MPT), which extends PT-GNN from the perspective of model architecture and pretext tasks to improve the cold-start recommendation performance. Specifically, in terms of the model architecture, in addition to the short-range dependencies of users and items captured by the GNN encoder, we introduce a Transformer encoder to capture long-range dependencies. In terms of the pretext task, in addition to considering the intra-correlations of users and items by the embedding reconstruction task, we add embedding contrastive learning task to capture inter-correlations of users and items. We train the GNN and Transformer encoders on these pretext tasks under the meta-learning setting to simulate the real cold-start scenario, making the model easily and rapidly being adapted to new cold-start users and items. Experiments on three public recommendation datasets show the superiority of the proposed MPT model against the vanilla GNN models, the pre-training GNN model on user/item embedding inference and the recommendation task.
abstract_zh: 冷启动问题是推荐任务的一个基本挑战。最近的图神经网络（GNN）模型 PT-GNN 上的自监督学习（SSL）对 GNN 模型进行预训练以重建冷启动嵌入，并在冷启动推荐方面显示出巨大的潜力。然而，由于过度平滑问题，PT-GNN 只能捕获最多 3 阶关系，无法提供太多有用的辅助信息来描述目标冷启动用户或项目。此外，嵌入重建任务仅考虑用户和项目子图内的内部相关性，而忽略了不同子图之间的相互相关性。为了解决上述挑战，我们提出了一种基于多策略的冷启动推荐（MPT）预训练方法，该方法从模型架构和借口任务的角度扩展了PT-GNN，以提高冷启动推荐性能。具体来说，在模型架构方面，除了GNN编码器捕获的用户和物品的短程依赖关系之外，我们还引入了Transformer编码器来捕获长程依赖关系。在借口任务方面，除了通过嵌入重建任务考虑用户和项目的内部相关性之外，我们还添加嵌入对比学习任务来捕获用户和项目的内部相关性。我们在元学习设置下对这些借口任务训练 GNN 和 Transformer 编码器，以模拟真实的冷启动场景，使模型轻松快速地适应新的冷启动用户和项目。在三个公共推荐数据集上的实验表明，所提出的 MPT 模型相对于普通 GNN 模型、用户/项目嵌入推理和推荐任务的预训练 GNN 模型具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多策略预训练方法MPT，用于解决推荐系统中的冷启动问题。
AI.motivation: 现有PT-GNN模型因过平滑问题仅能捕捉3阶关系，且未考虑用户/物品子图间的跨图关联，导致冷启动推荐效果受限。
AI.method: 在模型架构中引入Transformer编码器捕捉长距离依赖，在预训练任务中增加嵌入对比学习任务以建模跨图关联，并采用元学习框架进行训练。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上，MPT在冷启动推荐任务中优于基线模型及预训练GNN方法。
AI.conclusion: 多策略预训练方法通过融合图神经网络与Transformer架构、设计跨图对比任务，有效提升了冷启动推荐性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种多策略预训练方法MPT，用于解决推荐系统中的冷启动问题。

search_text: A Multi-Strategy based Pre-Training Method for Cold-Start Recommendation 一种基于多策略的冷启动推荐预训练方法 Cold-start problem is a fundamental challenge for recommendation tasks. The recent self-supervised learning (SSL) on Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) model, PT-GNN, pre-trains the GNN model to reconstruct the cold-start embeddings and has shown great potential for cold-start recommendation. However, due to the over-smoothing problem, PT-GNN can only capture up to 3-order relation, which can not provide much useful auxiliary information to depict the target cold-start user or item. Besides, the embedding reconstruction task only considers the intra-correlations within the subgraph of users and items, while ignoring the inter-correlations across different subgraphs. To solve the above challenges, we propose a multi-strategy based pre-training method for cold-start recommendation (MPT), which extends PT-GNN from the perspective of model architecture and pretext tasks to improve the cold-start recommendation performance. Specifically, in terms of the model architecture, in addition to the short-range dependencies of users and items captured by the GNN encoder, we introduce a Transformer encoder to capture long-range dependencies. In terms of the pretext task, in addition to considering the intra-correlations of users and items by the embedding reconstruction task, we add embedding contrastive learning task to capture inter-correlations of users and items. We train the GNN and Transformer encoders on these pretext tasks under the meta-learning setting to simulate the real cold-start scenario, making the model easily and rapidly being adapted to new cold-start users and items. Experiments on three public recommendation datasets show the superiority of the proposed MPT model against the vanilla GNN models, the pre-training GNN model on user/item embedding inference and the recommendation task. 冷启动问题是推荐任务的一个基本挑战。最近的图神经网络（GNN）模型 PT-GNN 上的自监督学习（SSL）对 GNN 模型进行预训练以重建冷启动嵌入，并在冷启动推荐方面显示出巨大的潜力。然而，由于过度平滑问题，PT-GNN 只能捕获最多 3 阶关系，无法提供太多有用的辅助信息来描述目标冷启动用户或项目。此外，嵌入重建任务仅考虑用户和项目子图内的内部相关性，而忽略了不同子图之间的相互相关性。为了解决上述挑战，我们提出了一种基于多策略的冷启动推荐（MPT）预训练方法，该方法从模型架构和借口任务的角度扩展了PT-GNN，以提高冷启动推荐性能。具体来说，在模型架构方面，除了GNN编码器捕获的用户和物品的短程依赖关系之外，我们还引入了Transformer编码器来捕获长程依赖关系。在借口任务方面，除了通过嵌入重建任务考虑用户和项目的内部相关性之外，我们还添加嵌入对比学习任务来捕获用户和项目的内部相关性。我们在元学习设置下对这些借口任务训练 GNN 和 Transformer 编码器，以模拟真实的冷启动场景，使模型轻松快速地适应新的冷启动用户和项目。在三个公共推荐数据集上的实验表明，所提出的 MPT 模型相对于普通 GNN 模型、用户/项目嵌入推理和推荐任务的预训练 GNN 模型具有优越性。 本文提出一种多策略预训练方法MPT，用于解决推荐系统中的冷启动问题。 Bowen Hao,Hongzhi Yin,Jing Zhang,Cuiping Li,Hong Chen cs.IR,cs.AI

title: Self-supervised Graph Learning for Occasional Group Recommendation
title_zh: 用于偶尔群体推荐的自监督图学习
comment: This paper uses self-supervised learning technique to enhance the embeddings of users/groups/items, the idea is novel in group recommendation scenario. However, some presentations need to be revised, so as to let the readers understand
comments: This paper uses self-supervised learning technique to enhance the embeddings of users/groups/items, the idea is novel in group recommendation scenario. However, some presentations need to be revised, so as to let the readers understand
abstract: As an important branch in Recommender System, occasional group recommendation has received more and more attention. In this scenario, each occasional group (cold-start group) has no or few historical interacted items. As each occasional group has extremely sparse interactions with items, traditional group recommendation methods can not learn high-quality group representations. The recent proposed Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), which incorporate the high-order neighbors of the target occasional group, can alleviate the above problem in some extent. However, these GNNs still can not explicitly strengthen the embedding quality of the high-order neighbors with few interactions. Motivated by the Self-supervised Learning technique, which is able to find the correlations within the data itself, we propose a self-supervised graph learning framework, which takes the user/item/group embedding reconstruction as the pretext task to enhance the embeddings of the cold-start users/items/groups. In order to explicitly enhance the high-order cold-start neighbors' embedding quality, we further introduce an embedding enhancer, which leverages the self-attention mechanism to improve the embedding quality for them. Comprehensive experiments show the advantages of our proposed framework than the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: As an important branch in Recommender System, occasional group recommendation has received more and more attention. In this scenario, each occasional group (cold-start group) has no or few historical interacted items. As each occasional group has extremely sparse interactions with items, traditional group recommendation methods can not learn high-quality group representations. The recent proposed Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), which incorporate the high-order neighbors of the target occasional group, can alleviate the above problem in some extent. However, these GNNs still can not explicitly strengthen the embedding quality of the high-order neighbors with few interactions. Motivated by the Self-supervised Learning technique, which is able to find the correlations within the data itself, we propose a self-supervised graph learning framework, which takes the user/item/group embedding reconstruction as the pretext task to enhance the embeddings of the cold-start users/items/groups. In order to explicitly enhance the high-order cold-start neighbors' embedding quality, we further introduce an embedding enhancer, which leverages the self-attention mechanism to improve the embedding quality for them. Comprehensive experiments show the advantages of our proposed framework than the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 作为推荐系统的一个重要分支，偶发群体推荐越来越受到人们的关注。在这种情况下，每个临时组（冷启动组）没有或很少有历史交互项。由于每个偶然的群体与项目的交互极其稀疏，传统的群体推荐方法无法学习高质量的群体表示。最近提出的图神经网络（GNN）结合了目标偶然组的高阶邻居，可以在一定程度上缓解上述问题。然而，这些 GNN 仍然无法显式地增强交互很少的高阶邻居的嵌入质量。受能够发现数据本身内部相关性的自监督学习技术的启发，我们提出了一种自监督图学习框架，该框架以用户/项目/组嵌入重建为借口任务，以增强冷启动用户/项目/组的嵌入。为了显式地增强高阶冷启动邻居的嵌入质量，我们进一步引入了嵌入增强器，它利用自注意力机制来提高它们的嵌入质量。综合实验表明我们提出的框架比最先进的方法具有优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督图学习框架，用于解决偶发群体推荐中的冷启动问题，通过增强用户、物品和群体的嵌入表示来提升推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 偶发群体因历史交互稀疏导致传统方法难以生成高质量群体表示，现有图神经网络（GNN）未能有效提升高阶邻居的嵌入质量。
AI.method: 设计自监督学习框架，以用户/物品/群体嵌入重构为预训练任务，并引入基于自注意力机制的嵌入增强器优化高阶冷启动邻居的表示。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架在多个数据集上优于现有最先进的偶发群体推荐方法。
AI.conclusion: 自监督图学习结合嵌入增强机制能有效缓解偶发群体推荐中的冷启动问题，提升高阶稀疏邻居的表示质量。

title: Feature-based Recognition Framework for Super-resolution Images
title_zh: 基于特征的超分辨率图像识别框架
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures
comments: 7 pages, 2 figures
abstract: In practical application, the performance of recognition network usually decreases when being applied on super-resolution images. In this paper, we propose a feature-based recognition network combined with GAN (FGAN). Our network improves the recognition accuracy by extracting more features that benefit recognition from SR images. In the experiment, we build three datasets using three different super-resolution algorithm, and our network increases the recognition accuracy by more than 6% comparing with ReaNet50 and DenseNet121.
summary: In practical application, the performance of recognition network usually decreases when being applied on super-resolution images. In this paper, we propose a feature-based recognition network combined with GAN (FGAN). Our network improves the recognition accuracy by extracting more features that benefit recognition from SR images. In the experiment, we build three datasets using three different super-resolution algorithm, and our network increases the recognition accuracy by more than 6% comparing with ReaNet50 and DenseNet121.
abstract_zh: 在实际应用中，识别网络在应用于超分辨率图像时，性能通常会下降。在本文中，我们提出了一种结合 GAN 的基于特征的识别网络（FGAN）。我们的网络通过从 SR 图像中提取更多有利于识别的特征来提高识别准确性。在实验中，我们使用三种不同的超分辨率算法构建了三个数据集，与ReaNet50和DenseNet121相比，我们的网络将识别精度提高了6%以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于特征的生成对抗网络（FGAN），旨在提升超分辨率图像的识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中超分辨率图像的识别性能通常下降，现有网络未能有效利用超分辨率图像中的特征信息。
AI.method: 设计结合生成对抗网络的特征提取框架（FGAN），通过挖掘更多有益于识别的特征来优化超分辨率图像的识别过程。
AI.result: 在三个不同超分辨率算法构建的数据集上，FGAN相比ReaNet50和DenseNet121的识别准确率提升超过6%。
AI.conclusion: FGAN通过特征增强有效提升了超分辨率图像的识别性能，验证了特征优化策略的有效性。

authors_text: Deze Wang,Zhouyang Jia,Shanshan Li,Yue Yu,Yun Xiong,Wei Dong,Xiangke Liao
title: Bridging Pre-trained Models and Downstream Tasks for Source Code Understanding
title_zh: 连接预训练模型和下游任务以实现源代码理解
comment: Accepted to the 44th International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE 2022)
comments: Accepted to the 44th International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE 2022)
abstract: With the great success of pre-trained models, the pretrain-then-finetune paradigm has been widely adopted on downstream tasks for source code understanding. However, compared to costly training a large-scale model from scratch, how to effectively adapt pre-trained models to a new task has not been fully explored. In this paper, we propose an approach to bridge pre-trained models and code-related tasks. We exploit semantic-preserving transformation to enrich downstream data diversity, and help pre-trained models learn semantic features invariant to these semantically equivalent transformations. Further, we introduce curriculum learning to organize the transformed data in an easy-to-hard manner to fine-tune existing pre-trained models. We apply our approach to a range of pre-trained models, and they significantly outperform the state-of-the-art models on tasks for source code understanding, such as algorithm classification, code clone detection, and code search. Our experiments even show that without heavy pre-training on code data, natural language pre-trained model RoBERTa fine-tuned with our lightweight approach could outperform or rival existing code pre-trained models fine-tuned on the above tasks, such as CodeBERT and GraphCodeBERT. This finding suggests that there is still much room for improvement in code pre-trained models.
summary: With the great success of pre-trained models, the pretrain-then-finetune paradigm has been widely adopted on downstream tasks for source code understanding. However, compared to costly training a large-scale model from scratch, how to effectively adapt pre-trained models to a new task has not been fully explored. In this paper, we propose an approach to bridge pre-trained models and code-related tasks. We exploit semantic-preserving transformation to enrich downstream data diversity, and help pre-trained models learn semantic features invariant to these semantically equivalent transformations. Further, we introduce curriculum learning to organize the transformed data in an easy-to-hard manner to fine-tune existing pre-trained models. We apply our approach to a range of pre-trained models, and they significantly outperform the state-of-the-art models on tasks for source code understanding, such as algorithm classification, code clone detection, and code search. Our experiments even show that without heavy pre-training on code data, natural language pre-trained model RoBERTa fine-tuned with our lightweight approach could outperform or rival existing code pre-trained models fine-tuned on the above tasks, such as CodeBERT and GraphCodeBERT. This finding suggests that there is still much room for improvement in code pre-trained models.
abstract_zh: 随着预训练模型的巨大成功，预训练-然后-微调范式已广泛应用于下游任务中以实现源代码理解。然而，与从头开始训练大规模模型的成本高昂相比，如何有效地将预训练模型适应新任务尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种连接预训练模型和代码相关任务的方法。我们利用语义保留转换来丰富下游数据多样性，并帮助预训练模型学习这些语义等效转换不变的语义特征。此外，我们引入课程学习，以从易到难的方式组织转换后的数据，以微调现有的预训练模型。我们将我们的方法应用于一系列预训练模型，它们在源代码理解任务（例如算法分类、代码克隆检测和代码搜索）上显着优于最先进的模型。我们的实验甚至表明，无需对代码数据进行大量预训练，使用我们的轻量级方法进行微调的自然语言预训练模型 RoBERTa 可以超越或竞争针对上述任务进行微调的现有代码预训练模型，例如 CodeBERT 和 GraphCodeBERT。这一发现表明代码预训练模型仍有很大的改进空间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种方法，通过语义保持转换和课程学习，将预训练模型有效适配到代码理解任务中。
AI.motivation: 尽管预训练模型在代码理解任务中广泛应用，但如何高效适配预训练模型到新任务仍缺乏深入探索。
AI.method: 利用语义保持转换增强下游数据多样性，并引入课程学习按难易程度组织数据，以微调现有预训练模型。
AI.result: 该方法在算法分类、代码克隆检测等任务中显著优于现有模型，且无需大量代码预训练的RoBERTa模型可媲美CodeBERT等专门模型。
AI.conclusion: 代码预训练模型仍有改进空间，本文方法为轻量级适配提供了有效途径。

However, compared to costly training a large-scale model from scratch, how to effectively adapt pre-trained models to a new task has not been fully explored. In this paper, we propose an approach to bridge pre-trained models and code-related tasks. authors_text: Chuang Zhu,Zheng Hu,Huihui Dong,Gang He,Zekuan Yu,Shangshang Zhang
title: Construct Informative Triplet with Two-stage Hard-sample Generation
title_zh: 通过两阶段硬样本生成构建信息三元组
abstract: In this paper, we propose a robust sample generation scheme to construct informative triplets. The proposed hard sample generation is a two-stage synthesis framework that produces hard samples through effective positive and negative sample generators in two stages, respectively. The first stage stretches the anchor-positive pairs with piecewise linear manipulation and enhances the quality of generated samples by skillfully designing a conditional generative adversarial network to lower the risk of mode collapse. The second stage utilizes an adaptive reverse metric constraint to generate the final hard samples. Extensive experiments on several benchmark datasets verify that our method achieves superior performance than the existing hard-sample generation algorithms. Besides, we also find that our proposed hard sample generation method combining the existing triplet mining strategies can further boost the deep metric learning performance.
summary: In this paper, we propose a robust sample generation scheme to construct informative triplets. The proposed hard sample generation is a two-stage synthesis framework that produces hard samples through effective positive and negative sample generators in two stages, respectively. The first stage stretches the anchor-positive pairs with piecewise linear manipulation and enhances the quality of generated samples by skillfully designing a conditional generative adversarial network to lower the risk of mode collapse. The second stage utilizes an adaptive reverse metric constraint to generate the final hard samples. Extensive experiments on several benchmark datasets verify that our method achieves superior performance than the existing hard-sample generation algorithms. Besides, we also find that our proposed hard sample generation method combining the existing triplet mining strategies can further boost the deep metric learning performance.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种稳健的样本生成方案来构建信息丰富的三元组。所提出的硬样本生成是一个两阶段综合框架，分别通过两个阶段的有效正样本生成器和负样本生成器生成硬样本。第一阶段通过分段线性操作拉伸锚正对，并通过巧妙设计条件生成对抗网络来提高生成样本的质量，以降低模式崩溃的风险。第二阶段利用自适应反向度量约束来生成最终的硬样本。对多个基准数据集的大量实验验证了我们的方法比现有的硬样本生成算法具有更优越的性能。此外，我们还发现我们提出的硬样本生成方法结合现有的三元组挖掘策略可以进一步提高深度度量学习的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段难样本生成方法，通过构建信息量大的三元组提升深度度量学习性能。
AI.motivation: 现有难样本生成方法存在模式崩溃风险或生成样本质量不足，需更有效策略提升三元组挖掘效果。
AI.method: 采用两阶段框架：第一阶段用分段线性操作拉伸锚-正样本对并设计条件GAN增强质量；第二阶段通过自适应反向度量约束生成最终难样本。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上优于现有算法，且结合传统三元组挖掘策略可进一步提升深度度量学习性能。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段生成框架能有效提升难样本质量，推动深度度量学习进展，与现有方法结合具有协同增益。

title: Towards the One Learning Algorithm Hypothesis: A System-theoretic Approach
title_zh: 迈向单一学习算法假设：一种系统理论方法
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2102.05836
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2102.05836
abstract: The existence of a universal learning architecture in human cognition is a widely spread conjecture supported by experimental findings from neuroscience. While no low-level implementation can be specified yet, an abstract outline of human perception and learning is believed to entail three basic properties: (a) hierarchical attention and processing, (b) memory-based knowledge representation, and (c) progressive learning and knowledge compaction. We approach the design of such a learning architecture from a system-theoretic viewpoint, developing a closed-loop system with three main components: (i) a multi-resolution analysis pre-processor, (ii) a group-invariant feature extractor, and (iii) a progressive knowledge-based learning module. Multi-resolution feedback loops are used for learning, i.e., for adapting the system parameters to online observations. To design (i) and (ii), we build upon the established theory of wavelet-based multi-resolution analysis and the properties of group convolution operators. Regarding (iii), we introduce a novel learning algorithm that constructs progressively growing knowledge representations in multiple resolutions. The proposed algorithm is an extension of the Online Deterministic Annealing (ODA) algorithm based on annealing optimization, solved using gradient-free stochastic approximation. ODA has inherent robustness and regularization properties and provides a means to progressively increase the complexity of the learning model i.e. the number of the neurons, as needed, through an intuitive bifurcation phenomenon. The proposed multi-resolution approach is hierarchical, progressive, knowledge-based, and interpretable. We illustrate the properties of the proposed architecture in the context of the state-of-the-art learning algorithms and deep learning methods.
summary: The existence of a universal learning architecture in human cognition is a widely spread conjecture supported by experimental findings from neuroscience. While no low-level implementation can be specified yet, an abstract outline of human perception and learning is believed to entail three basic properties: (a) hierarchical attention and processing, (b) memory-based knowledge representation, and (c) progressive learning and knowledge compaction. We approach the design of such a learning architecture from a system-theoretic viewpoint, developing a closed-loop system with three main components: (i) a multi-resolution analysis pre-processor, (ii) a group-invariant feature extractor, and (iii) a progressive knowledge-based learning module. Multi-resolution feedback loops are used for learning, i.e., for adapting the system parameters to online observations. To design (i) and (ii), we build upon the established theory of wavelet-based multi-resolution analysis and the properties of group convolution operators. Regarding (iii), we introduce a novel learning algorithm that constructs progressively growing knowledge representations in multiple resolutions. The proposed algorithm is an extension of the Online Deterministic Annealing (ODA) algorithm based on annealing optimization, solved using gradient-free stochastic approximation. ODA has inherent robustness and regularization properties and provides a means to progressively increase the complexity of the learning model i.e. the number of the neurons, as needed, through an intuitive bifurcation phenomenon. The proposed multi-resolution approach is hierarchical, progressive, knowledge-based, and interpretable. We illustrate the properties of the proposed architecture in the context of the state-of-the-art learning algorithms and deep learning methods.
abstract_zh: 人类认知中存在通用学习架构是一个广泛传播的猜想，得到了神经科学实验结果的支持。虽然尚无法指定低级实现，但人类感知和学习的抽象轮廓被认为需要三个基本属性：（a）分层注意力和处理，（b）基于记忆的知识表示，以及（c）渐进式学习和知识压缩。我们从系统理论的角度来设计这种学习架构，开发了一个包含三个主要组件的闭环系统：（i）多分辨率分析预处理器，（ii）组不变特征提取器，以及（iii）渐进式基于知识的学习模块。多分辨率反馈循环用于学习，即使系统参数适应在线观察。为了设计（i）和（ii），我们建立在基于小波的多分辨率分析的既定理论和群卷积算子的属性的基础上。关于（iii），我们引入了一种新颖的学习算法，该算法以多种分辨率构建逐渐增长的知识表示。该算法是基于退火优化的在线确定性退火 (ODA) 算法的扩展，使用无梯度随机近似求解。 ODA 具有固有的鲁棒性和正则化特性，并提供了一种通过直观的分叉现象逐步增加学习模型复杂性的方法，即根据需要增加神经元的数量。所提出的多分辨率方法是分层的、渐进的、基于知识的且可解释的。我们在最先进的学习算法和深度学习方法的背景下说明了所提出的架构的特性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于系统理论的统一学习算法架构，结合多分辨率分析、群不变特征提取和渐进式知识学习模块，以实现类似人类认知的层次化、渐进式学习。
AI.motivation: 基于神经科学实验发现人类认知存在通用学习架构的猜想，试图通过系统理论设计具备层次化注意、记忆表征和渐进学习特性的抽象学习模型。
AI.method: 构建包含多分辨率预处理器、群不变特征提取器和渐进知识学习模块的闭环系统，结合小波多分辨率分析、群卷积理论及改进的无梯度随机逼近在线确定性退火算法。
AI.result: 提出的多分辨率架构在层次性、渐进性、知识表征和可解释性方面优于现有深度学习方法，能通过分叉现象动态调整模型复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 验证了统一学习算法假设的可行性，为开发兼具人类认知特性和计算效率的通用学习框架提供了理论基础和实现路径。

search_text: Towards the One Learning Algorithm Hypothesis: A System-theoretic Approach 迈向单一学习算法假设：一种系统理论方法 The existence of a universal learning architecture in human cognition is a widely spread conjecture supported by experimental findings from neuroscience. While no low-level implementation can be specified yet, an abstract outline of human perception and learning is believed to entail three basic properties: (a) hierarchical attention and processing, (b) memory-based knowledge representation, and (c) progressive learning and knowledge compaction. We approach the design of such a learning architecture from a system-theoretic viewpoint, developing a closed-loop system with three main components: (i) a multi-resolution analysis pre-processor, (ii) a group-invariant feature extractor, and (iii) a progressive knowledge-based learning module. Multi-resolution feedback loops are used for learning, i.e., for adapting the system parameters to online observations. To design (i) and (ii), we build upon the established theory of wavelet-based multi-resolution analysis and the properties of group convolution operators. Regarding (iii), we introduce a novel learning algorithm that constructs progressively growing knowledge representations in multiple resolutions. The proposed algorithm is an extension of the Online Deterministic Annealing (ODA) algorithm based on annealing optimization, solved using gradient-free stochastic approximation. ODA has inherent robustness and regularization properties and provides a means to progressively increase the complexity of the learning model i.e. the number of the neurons, as needed, through an intuitive bifurcation phenomenon. The proposed multi-resolution approach is hierarchical, progressive, knowledge-based, and interpretable. We illustrate the properties of the proposed architecture in the context of the state-of-the-art learning algorithms and deep learning methods. 人类认知中存在通用学习架构是一个广泛传播的猜想，得到了神经科学实验结果的支持。虽然尚无法指定低级实现，但人类感知和学习的抽象轮廓被认为需要三个基本属性：（a）分层注意力和处理，（b）基于记忆的知识表示，以及（c）渐进式学习和知识压缩。我们从系统理论的角度来设计这种学习架构，开发了一个包含三个主要组件的闭环系统：（i）多分辨率分析预处理器，（ii）组不变特征提取器，以及（iii）渐进式基于知识的学习模块。多分辨率反馈循环用于学习，即使系统参数适应在线观察。为了设计（i）和（ii），我们建立在基于小波的多分辨率分析的既定理论和群卷积算子的属性的基础上。关于（iii），我们引入了一种新颖的学习算法，该算法以多种分辨率构建逐渐增长的知识表示。该算法是基于退火优化的在线确定性退火 (ODA) 算法的扩展，使用无梯度随机近似求解。 ODA 具有固有的鲁棒性和正则化特性，并提供了一种通过直观的分叉现象逐步增加学习模型复杂性的方法，即根据需要增加神经元的数量。所提出的多分辨率方法是分层的、渐进的、基于知识的且可解释的。我们在最先进的学习算法和深度学习方法的背景下说明了所提出的架构的特性。 本文提出一种基于系统理论的统一学习算法架构，结合多分辨率分析、群不变特征提取和渐进式知识学习模块，以实现类似人类认知的层次化、渐进式学习。 Christos Mavridis,John Baras cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.AS,eess.IV,eess.SY

title: In Search of Ambiguity: A Three-Stage Workflow Design to Clarify Annotation Guidelines for Crowd Workers
title_zh: 寻找歧义：三阶段工作流程设计，以澄清 Crowd Workers 的注释指南
comment: 22 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables
comments: 22 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables
abstract: We propose a novel three-stage FIND-RESOLVE-LABEL workflow for crowdsourced annotation to reduce ambiguity in task instructions and thus improve annotation quality. Stage 1 (FIND) asks the crowd to find examples whose correct label seems ambiguous given task instructions. Workers are also asked to provide a short tag which describes the ambiguous concept embodied by the specific instance found. We compare collaborative vs. non-collaborative designs for this stage. In Stage 2 (RESOLVE), the requester selects one or more of these ambiguous examples to label (resolving ambiguity). The new label(s) are automatically injected back into task instructions in order to improve clarity. Finally, in Stage 3 (LABEL), workers perform the actual annotation using the revised guidelines with clarifying examples. We compare three designs for using these examples: examples only, tags only, or both. We report image labeling experiments over six task designs using Amazon's Mechanical Turk. Results show improved annotation accuracy and further insights regarding effective design for crowdsourced annotation tasks.
summary: We propose a novel three-stage FIND-RESOLVE-LABEL workflow for crowdsourced annotation to reduce ambiguity in task instructions and thus improve annotation quality. Stage 1 (FIND) asks the crowd to find examples whose correct label seems ambiguous given task instructions. Workers are also asked to provide a short tag which describes the ambiguous concept embodied by the specific instance found. We compare collaborative vs. non-collaborative designs for this stage. In Stage 2 (RESOLVE), the requester selects one or more of these ambiguous examples to label (resolving ambiguity). The new label(s) are automatically injected back into task instructions in order to improve clarity. Finally, in Stage 3 (LABEL), workers perform the actual annotation using the revised guidelines with clarifying examples. We compare three designs for using these examples: examples only, tags only, or both. We report image labeling experiments over six task designs using Amazon's Mechanical Turk. Results show improved annotation accuracy and further insights regarding effective design for crowdsourced annotation tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的三阶段“查找-解析-标签”工作流程，用于众包注释，以减少任务指令中的歧义，从而提高注释质量。第一阶段（FIND）要求人群找到在给定任务指令的情况下其正确标签似乎不明确的示例。工作人员还被要求提供一个简短的标签，描述所发现的特定实例所体现的模糊概念。我们比较此阶段的协作设计与非协作设计。在第 2 阶段（解决）中，请求者选择一个或多个这些不明确的示例进行标记（解决不明确性）。新标签会自动注入任务指令中，以提高清晰度。最后，在第 3 阶段（标签），工作人员使用修订后的指南和澄清示例进行实际注释。我们比较使用这些示例的三种设计：仅示例、仅标签或两者。我们报告了使用亚马逊 Mechanical Turk 进行的六种任务设计的图像标记实验。结果显示注释准确性得到提高，并进一步深入了解了众包注释任务的有效设计。

AI.tldr: 设计一个三阶段工作流程（FIND-RESOLVE-LABEL）以减少众包标注任务中的歧义，提升标注质量。
AI.motivation: 现有标注指南可能存在歧义，导致众包工作者标注结果不一致，影响任务准确性。
AI.method: 提出三阶段流程：1) FIND阶段让工作者识别歧义实例并标记；2) RESOLVE阶段通过新增标签优化指南；3) LABEL阶段使用优化后的指南进行标注，并比较不同设计效果。
AI.result: 在Amazon Mechanical Turk上的图像标注实验显示，改进后的流程显著提升标注准确率，并提供有效设计见解。
AI.conclusion: 三阶段工作流程能有效减少歧义，提高众包标注任务的质量与一致性。

authors_text: Yikai Wang,Fuchun Sun,Wenbing Huang,Fengxiang He,Dacheng Tao
title: Channel Exchanging Networks for Multimodal and Multitask Dense Image Prediction
title_zh: 用于多模态和多任务密集图像预测的通道交换网络
comment: Accepted by TPAMI 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/yikaiw/CEN. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2011.05005
comments: Accepted by TPAMI 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/yikaiw/CEN. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2011.05005
abstract: Multimodal fusion and multitask learning are two vital topics in machine learning. Despite the fruitful progress, existing methods for both problems are still brittle to the same challenge -- it remains dilemmatic to integrate the common information across modalities (resp. tasks) meanwhile preserving the specific patterns of each modality (resp. task). Besides, while they are actually closely related to each other, multimodal fusion and multitask learning are rarely explored within the same methodological framework before. In this paper, we propose Channel-Exchanging-Network (CEN) which is self-adaptive, parameter-free, and more importantly, applicable for multimodal and multitask dense image prediction. At its core, CEN adaptively exchanges channels between subnetworks of different modalities. Specifically, the channel exchanging process is self-guided by individual channel importance that is measured by the magnitude of Batch-Normalization (BN) scaling factor during training. For the application of dense image prediction, the validity of CEN is tested by four different scenarios: multimodal fusion, cycle multimodal fusion, multitask learning, and multimodal multitask learning. Extensive experiments on semantic segmentation via RGB-D data and image translation through multi-domain input verify the effectiveness of CEN compared to state-of-the-art methods. Detailed ablation studies have also been carried out, which demonstrate the advantage of each component we propose. Our code is available at https://github.com/yikaiw/CEN.
summary: Multimodal fusion and multitask learning are two vital topics in machine learning. Despite the fruitful progress, existing methods for both problems are still brittle to the same challenge -- it remains dilemmatic to integrate the common information across modalities (resp. tasks) meanwhile preserving the specific patterns of each modality (resp. task). Besides, while they are actually closely related to each other, multimodal fusion and multitask learning are rarely explored within the same methodological framework before. In this paper, we propose Channel-Exchanging-Network (CEN) which is self-adaptive, parameter-free, and more importantly, applicable for multimodal and multitask dense image prediction. At its core, CEN adaptively exchanges channels between subnetworks of different modalities. Specifically, the channel exchanging process is self-guided by individual channel importance that is measured by the magnitude of Batch-Normalization (BN) scaling factor during training. For the application of dense image prediction, the validity of CEN is tested by four different scenarios: multimodal fusion, cycle multimodal fusion, multitask learning, and multimodal multitask learning. Extensive experiments on semantic segmentation via RGB-D data and image translation through multi-domain input verify the effectiveness of CEN compared to state-of-the-art methods. Detailed ablation studies have also been carried out, which demonstrate the advantage of each component we propose. Our code is available at https://github.com/yikaiw/CEN.
abstract_zh: 多模态融合和多任务学习是机器学习中的两个重要主题。尽管取得了丰硕的进展，但解决这两个问题的现有方法仍然难以应对同样的挑战——跨模态（或任务）集成公共信息，同时保留每种模态（或任务）的特定模式，仍然处于困境。此外，虽然它们实际上彼此密切相关，但多模态融合和多任务学习以前很少在同一方法论框架内进行探索。在本文中，我们提出了自适应、无参数的通道交换网络（CEN），更重要的是，它适用于多模态和多任务密集图像预测。 CEN 的核心是在不同模式的子网络之间自适应地交换通道。具体来说，通道交换过程是由各个通道重要性自行引导的，该重要性是通过训练期间批量归一化（BN）缩放因子的大小来衡量的。针对密集图像预测的应用，通过多模态融合、循环多模态融合、多任务学习、多模态多任务学习四种不同场景来测试CEN的有效性。通过 RGB-D 数据进行语义分割和通过多域输入进行图像翻译的大量实验验证了 CEN 与最先进方法相比的有效性。还进行了详细的消融研究，证明了我们提出的每个组件的优点。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/yikaiw/CEN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通道交换网络（CEN），用于多模态和多任务密集图像预测，解决信息整合与特征保留的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时有效融合多模态/多任务的通用信息并保持各自特性，且缺乏统一框架处理两者。
AI.method: 设计参数免费的CEN，通过BN缩放因子幅度自适应交换不同模态子网络的通道，实现信息交互与特征保留。
AI.result: 在RGB-D语义分割和多域图像翻译任务中，CEN优于现有方法，消融实验证明组件有效性。
AI.conclusion: CEN为多模态与多任务学习提供统一框架，在密集图像预测中展现参数高效性与有效性。

tldr: 本文提出通道交换网络（CEN），用于多模态和多任务密集图像预测，解决信息整合与特征保留的矛盾。
motivation: 现有方法难以同时有效融合多模态/多任务的通用信息并保持各自特性，且缺乏统一框架处理两者。
method: 设计参数免费的CEN，通过BN缩放因子幅度自适应交换不同模态子网络的通道，实现信息交互与特征保留。
result: 在RGB-D语义分割和多域图像翻译任务中，CEN优于现有方法，消融实验证明组件有效性。
conclusion: CEN为多模态与多任务学习提供统一框架，在密集图像预测中展现参数高效性与有效性。
search_text: Channel Exchanging Networks for Multimodal and Multitask Dense Image Prediction 用于多模态和多任务密集图像预测的通道交换网络 Multimodal fusion and multitask learning are two vital topics in machine learning. Despite the fruitful progress, existing methods for both problems are still brittle to the same challenge -- it remains dilemmatic to integrate the common information across modalities (resp. tasks) meanwhile preserving the specific patterns of each modality (resp. task). Besides, while they are actually closely related to each other, multimodal fusion and multitask learning are rarely explored within the same methodological framework before. In this paper, we propose Channel-Exchanging-Network (CEN) which is self-adaptive, parameter-free, and more importantly, applicable for multimodal and multitask dense image prediction. At its core, CEN adaptively exchanges channels between subnetworks of different modalities. Specifically, the channel exchanging process is self-guided by individual channel importance that is measured by the magnitude of Batch-Normalization (BN) scaling factor during training. For the application of dense image prediction, the validity of CEN is tested by four different scenarios: multimodal fusion, cycle multimodal fusion, multitask learning, and multimodal multitask learning. Extensive experiments on semantic segmentation via RGB-D data and image translation through multi-domain input verify the effectiveness of CEN compared to state-of-the-art methods. Detailed ablation studies have also been carried out, which demonstrate the advantage of each component we propose. Our code is available at https://github.com/yikaiw/CEN. 多模态融合和多任务学习是机器学习中的两个重要主题。尽管取得了丰硕的进展，但解决这两个问题的现有方法仍然难以应对同样的挑战——跨模态（或任务）集成公共信息，同时保留每种模态（或任务）的特定模式，仍然处于困境。此外，虽然它们实际上彼此密切相关，但多模态融合和多任务学习以前很少在同一方法论框架内进行探索。在本文中，我们提出了自适应、无参数的通道交换网络（CEN），更重要的是，它适用于多模态和多任务密集图像预测。 CEN 的核心是在不同模式的子网络之间自适应地交换通道。具体来说，通道交换过程是由各个通道重要性自行引导的，该重要性是通过训练期间批量归一化（BN）缩放因子的大小来衡量的。针对密集图像预测的应用，通过多模态融合、循环多模态融合、多任务学习、多模态多任务学习四种不同场景来测试CEN的有效性。通过 RGB-D 数据进行语义分割和通过多域输入进行图像翻译的大量实验验证了 CEN 与最先进方法相比的有效性。还进行了详细的消融研究，证明了我们提出的每个组件的优点。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/yikaiw/CEN 获取。 本文提出通道交换网络（CEN），用于多模态和多任务密集图像预测，解决信息整合与特征保留的矛盾。 Yikai Wang,Fuchun Sun,Wenbing Huang,Fengxiang He,Dacheng Tao cs.CV

title: Dense Extreme Inception Network for Edge Detection
title_zh: 用于边缘检测的密集极端初始网络
comment: Manuscript published by Pattern Recognition journal in 2023
comments: Manuscript published by Pattern Recognition journal in 2023
abstract: <<<This is a pre-acceptance version, please, go through Pattern Recognition Journal on Sciencedirect to read the final version>>>. Edge detection is the basis of many computer vision applications. State of the art predominantly relies on deep learning with two decisive factors: dataset content and network's architecture. Most of the publicly available datasets are not curated for edge detection tasks. Here, we offer a solution to this constraint. First, we argue that edges, contours and boundaries, despite their overlaps, are three distinct visual features requiring separate benchmark datasets. To this end, we present a new dataset of edges. Second, we propose a novel architecture, termed Dense Extreme Inception Network for Edge Detection (DexiNed), that can be trained from scratch without any pre-trained weights. DexiNed outperforms other algorithms in the presented dataset. It also generalizes well to other datasets without any fine-tuning. The higher quality of DexiNed is also perceptually evident thanks to the sharper and finer edges it outputs.

Second, we propose a novel architecture, termed Dense Extreme Inception Network for Edge Detection (DexiNed), that can be trained from scratch without any pre-trained weights. DexiNed outperforms other algorithms in the presented dataset. It also generalizes well to other datasets without any fine-tuning. The higher quality of DexiNed is also perceptually evident thanks to the sharper and finer edges it outputs.
abstract_zh: <<<这是预验收版本，请通过 Sciencedirect 上的 Pattern Recognition Journal 阅读最终版本>>>。边缘检测是许多计算机视觉应用的基础。最先进的技术主要依赖于深度学习，其中有两个决定性因素：数据集内容和网络架构。大多数公开可用的数据集并不是针对边缘检测任务而设计的。在这里，我们针对这个限制提供了一个解决方案。首先，我们认为边缘、轮廓和边界尽管有重叠，但却是三个不同的视觉特征，需要单独的基准数据集。为此，我们提出了一个新的边缘数据集。其次，我们提出了一种新颖的架构，称为用于边缘检测的密集极端初始网络（DexiNed），它可以从头开始训练，无需任何预先训练的权重。 DexiNed 在所提供的数据集中优于其他算法。它也可以很好地推广到其他数据集，无需任何微调。 DexiNed 的更高质量在感知上也很明显，这要归功于它输出的更锐利和更精细的边缘。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的密集极端inception网络（DexiNed）用于边缘检测，并构建了专门的边缘检测数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有公开数据集未针对边缘检测任务进行优化，且边缘、轮廓和边界作为不同视觉特征需要独立基准数据集。
AI.method: 构建新的边缘检测数据集，设计无需预训练权重的DexiNed网络架构，结合密集连接与极端inception模块。
AI.result: DexiNed在自有数据集上优于其他算法，且无需微调即可泛化至其他数据集，输出边缘更清晰精细。
AI.conclusion: DexiNed为边缘检测提供了有效解决方案，配套数据集有助于推动该领域研究进展。

title: Dual-Flow Transformation Network for Deformable Image Registration with Region Consistency Constraint
title_zh: 用于具有区域一致性约束的变形图像配准的双流变换网络
comment: This paper have some errors for experiment results, thus we want to withdraw this paper. We will update the revised paper. This paper is not published in any journal or conference
comments: This paper have some errors for experiment results, thus we want to withdraw this paper. We will update the revised paper. This paper is not published in any journal or conference
abstract: Deformable image registration is able to achieve fast and accurate alignment between a pair of images and thus plays an important role in many medical image studies. The current deep learning (DL)-based image registration approaches directly learn the spatial transformation from one image to another by leveraging a convolutional neural network, requiring ground truth or similarity metric. Nevertheless, these methods only use a global similarity energy function to evaluate the similarity of a pair of images, which ignores the similarity of regions of interest (ROIs) within images. Moreover, DL-based methods often estimate global spatial transformations of image directly, which never pays attention to region spatial transformations of ROIs within images. In this paper, we present a novel dual-flow transformation network with region consistency constraint which maximizes the similarity of ROIs within a pair of images and estimates both global and region spatial transformations simultaneously. Experiments on four public 3D MRI datasets show that the proposed method achieves the best registration performance in accuracy and generalization compared with other state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Deformable image registration is able to achieve fast and accurate alignment between a pair of images and thus plays an important role in many medical image studies. The current deep learning (DL)-based image registration approaches directly learn the spatial transformation from one image to another by leveraging a convolutional neural network, requiring ground truth or similarity metric. Nevertheless, these methods only use a global similarity energy function to evaluate the similarity of a pair of images, which ignores the similarity of regions of interest (ROIs) within images. Moreover, DL-based methods often estimate global spatial transformations of image directly, which never pays attention to region spatial transformations of ROIs within images. In this paper, we present a novel dual-flow transformation network with region consistency constraint which maximizes the similarity of ROIs within a pair of images and estimates both global and region spatial transformations simultaneously. Experiments on four public 3D MRI datasets show that the proposed method achieves the best registration performance in accuracy and generalization compared with other state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 可变形图像配准能够实现一对图像之间的快速准确的对准，因此在许多医学图像研究中发挥着重要作用。当前基于深度学习（DL）的图像配准方法通过利用卷积神经网络直接学习从一张图像到另一张图像的空间变换，需要地面实况或相似性度量。然而，这些方法仅使用全局相似性能量函数来评估一对图像的相似性，而忽略了图像内感兴趣区域（ROI）的相似性。此外，基于深度学习的方法通常直接估计图像的全局空间变换，而从不关注图像内 ROI 的区域空间变换。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有区域一致性约束的新型双流变换网络，它最大化了一对图像中 ROI 的相似性，并同时估计全局和区域空间变换。在四个公共 3D MRI 数据集上的实验表明，与其他最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法在准确性和泛化方面实现了最佳配准性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种具有区域一致性约束的双流变换网络，用于改进可变形医学图像配准的精度和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习配准方法仅依赖全局相似性度量，忽视了图像中感兴趣区域（ROI）的局部相似性及区域级空间变换，导致配准精度和鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 设计双流变换网络架构，通过区域一致性约束同时优化全局空间变换和ROI级空间变换，增强局部区域特征对齐。
AI.result: 在四个公开3D MRI数据集上，该方法在配准精度和跨数据集泛化能力方面均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 区域一致性约束的双流网络有效提升了医学图像配准的局部特征对齐能力，为精准医疗应用提供了更可靠的配准方案。

title: Algorithms for Maximum Internal Spanning Tree Problem for Some Graph Classes
title_zh: 某些图类的最大内部生成树问题的算法
abstract: For a given graph $G$, a maximum internal spanning tree of $G$ is a spanning tree of $G$ with maximum number of internal vertices. The Maximum Internal Spanning Tree (MIST) problem is to find a maximum internal spanning tree of the given graph. The MIST problem is a generalization of the Hamiltonian path problem. Since the Hamiltonian path problem is NP-hard, even for bipartite and chordal graphs, two important subclasses of graphs, the MIST problem also remains NP-hard for these graph classes. In this paper, we propose linear-time algorithms to compute a maximum internal spanning tree of cographs, block graphs, cactus graphs, chain graphs and bipartite permutation graphs. The optimal path cover problem, which asks to find a path cover of the given graph with maximum number of edges, is also a well studied problem. In this paper, we also study the relationship between the number of internal vertices in maximum internal spanning tree and number of edges in optimal path cover for the special graph classes mentioned above.
summary: For a given graph $G$, a maximum internal spanning tree of $G$ is a spanning tree of $G$ with maximum number of internal vertices. The Maximum Internal Spanning Tree (MIST) problem is to find a maximum internal spanning tree of the given graph. The MIST problem is a generalization of the Hamiltonian path problem. Since the Hamiltonian path problem is NP-hard, even for bipartite and chordal graphs, two important subclasses of graphs, the MIST problem also remains NP-hard for these graph classes. In this paper, we propose linear-time algorithms to compute a maximum internal spanning tree of cographs, block graphs, cactus graphs, chain graphs and bipartite permutation graphs. The optimal path cover problem, which asks to find a path cover of the given graph with maximum number of edges, is also a well studied problem. In this paper, we also study the relationship between the number of internal vertices in maximum internal spanning tree and number of edges in optimal path cover for the special graph classes mentioned above.
abstract_zh: 对于给定图$G$，$G$的最大内部生成树是具有最大内部顶点数的$G$的生成树。最大内部生成树（MIST）问题是找到给定图的最大内部生成树。 MIST 问题是哈密顿路径问题的推广。由于哈密顿路径问题是 NP 困难的，即使对于二分图和弦图（图的两个重要子类）来说，MIST 问题对于这些图类也仍然是 NP 困难的。在本文中，我们提出了线性时间算法来计算图、块图、仙人掌图、链图和二部置换图的最大内部生成树。最优路径覆盖问题，要求找到给定图的具有最大边数的路径覆盖，也是一个经过充分研究的问题。在本文中，我们还研究了上述特殊图类的最大内部生成树的内部顶点数与最佳路径覆盖的边数之间的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文针对特定图类（如cograph、块图等）提出线性时间算法解决最大内部生成树问题，并探讨其与最优路径覆盖的关系。
AI.motivation: 最大内部生成树问题（MIST）是NP难问题，但针对特定图类可能存在高效算法。研究此类图的线性时间算法可为实际应用提供理论支持。
AI.method: 设计适用于cograph、块图、cactus图等特殊图类的线性时间算法，并分析这些图类中MIST与最优路径覆盖问题的关联性。
AI.result: 为cograph、块图、cactus图等五类图提出线性时间MIST算法，并建立内部顶点数与最优路径覆盖边数的定量关系。
AI.conclusion: 针对特定图类的线性时间算法有效解决了MIST问题，同时揭示了生成树与路径覆盖问题间的理论联系，为相关研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Zhao Yang,Jiaqi Wang,Yansong Tang,Kai Chen,Hengshuang Zhao,Philip H. S. Torr
title: LAVT: Language-Aware Vision Transformer for Referring Image Segmentation
title_zh: LAVT：用于参考图像分割的语言感知视觉转换器
comment: CVPR 2022
comments: CVPR 2022
abstract: Referring image segmentation is a fundamental vision-language task that aims to segment out an object referred to by a natural language expression from an image. One of the key challenges behind this task is leveraging the referring expression for highlighting relevant positions in the image. A paradigm for tackling this problem is to leverage a powerful vision-language ("cross-modal") decoder to fuse features independently extracted from a vision encoder and a language encoder. Recent methods have made remarkable advancements in this paradigm by exploiting Transformers as cross-modal decoders, concurrent to the Transformer's overwhelming success in many other vision-language tasks. Adopting a different approach in this work, we show that significantly better cross-modal alignments can be achieved through the early fusion of linguistic and visual features in intermediate layers of a vision Transformer encoder network. By conducting cross-modal feature fusion in the visual feature encoding stage, we can leverage the well-proven correlation modeling power of a Transformer encoder for excavating helpful multi-modal context. This way, accurate segmentation results are readily harvested with a light-weight mask predictor. Without bells and whistles, our method surpasses the previous state-of-the-art methods on RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, and G-Ref by large margins.
summary: Referring image segmentation is a fundamental vision-language task that aims to segment out an object referred to by a natural language expression from an image. One of the key challenges behind this task is leveraging the referring expression for highlighting relevant positions in the image. A paradigm for tackling this problem is to leverage a powerful vision-language ("cross-modal") decoder to fuse features independently extracted from a vision encoder and a language encoder. Recent methods have made remarkable advancements in this paradigm by exploiting Transformers as cross-modal decoders, concurrent to the Transformer's overwhelming success in many other vision-language tasks. Adopting a different approach in this work, we show that significantly better cross-modal alignments can be achieved through the early fusion of linguistic and visual features in intermediate layers of a vision Transformer encoder network. By conducting cross-modal feature fusion in the visual feature encoding stage, we can leverage the well-proven correlation modeling power of a Transformer encoder for excavating helpful multi-modal context. This way, accurate segmentation results are readily harvested with a light-weight mask predictor. Without bells and whistles, our method surpasses the previous state-of-the-art methods on RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, and G-Ref by large margins.
abstract_zh: 引用图像分割是一项基本的视觉语言任务，旨在从图像中分割出自然语言表达所引用的对象。这项任务背后的关键挑战之一是利用引用表达式来突出显示图像中的相关位置。解决这个问题的一个范例是利用强大的视觉语言（“跨模式”）解码器来融合从视觉编码器和语言编码器独立提取的特征。最近的方法通过利用 Transformer 作为跨模式解码器，在这一范式中取得了显着的进步，同时 Transformer 在许多其他视觉语言任务中取得了压倒性的成功。在这项工作中采用不同的方法，我们表明，通过视觉 Transformer 编码器网络的中间层中的语言和视觉特征的早期融合，可以实现明显更好的跨模式对齐。通过在视觉特征编码阶段进行跨模态特征融合，我们可以利用 Transformer 编码器经过充分验证的相关建模能力来挖掘有用的多模态上下文。这样，使用轻量级掩模预测器就可以轻松获得准确的分割结果。没有花里胡哨的东西，我们的方法大幅超越了 RefCOCO、RefCOCO+ 和 G-Ref 上之前最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LAVT模型，通过语言感知的视觉Transformer实现参照图像分割任务，旨在根据自然语言描述准确分割图像中的目标对象。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖跨模态解码器独立提取视觉和语言特征，但未能充分利用Transformer编码器在早期融合阶段的多模态上下文建模能力。
AI.method: 在视觉Transformer编码器的中间层进行语言和视觉特征的早期融合，通过Transformer编码器的关联建模能力挖掘多模态上下文，最后使用轻量级掩码预测器生成分割结果。
AI.result: 在RefCOCO、RefCOCO+和G-Ref数据集上显著超越现有最先进方法，且无需复杂技巧。
AI.conclusion: 早期特征融合策略能有效提升跨模态对齐效果，为参照图像分割任务提供高效且准确的解决方案。

authors_text: Diqiong Jiang,Yiwei Jin,Fanglue Zhang,Zhe Zhu,Yun Zhang,Ruofeng Tong,Min Tang
title: Sphere Face Model:A 3D Morphable Model with Hypersphere Manifold Latent Space
title_zh: 球面模型：具有超球面流形潜在空间的3D可变形模型
abstract: 3D Morphable Models (3DMMs) are generative models for face shape and appearance. However, the shape parameters of traditional 3DMMs satisfy the multivariate Gaussian distribution while the identity embeddings satisfy the hypersphere distribution, and this conflict makes it challenging for face reconstruction models to preserve the faithfulness and the shape consistency simultaneously. To address this issue, we propose the Sphere Face Model(SFM), a novel 3DMM for monocular face reconstruction, which can preserve both shape fidelity and identity consistency. The core of our SFM is the basis matrix which can be used to reconstruct 3D face shapes, and the basic matrix is learned by adopting a two-stage training approach where 3D and 2D training data are used in the first and second stages, respectively. To resolve the distribution mismatch, we design a novel loss to make the shape parameters have a hyperspherical latent space. Extensive experiments show that SFM has high representation ability and shape parameter space's clustering performance. Moreover, it produces fidelity face shapes, and the shapes are consistent in challenging conditions in monocular face reconstruction.
summary: 3D Morphable Models (3DMMs) are generative models for face shape and appearance. However, the shape parameters of traditional 3DMMs satisfy the multivariate Gaussian distribution while the identity embeddings satisfy the hypersphere distribution, and this conflict makes it challenging for face reconstruction models to preserve the faithfulness and the shape consistency simultaneously. To address this issue, we propose the Sphere Face Model(SFM), a novel 3DMM for monocular face reconstruction, which can preserve both shape fidelity and identity consistency. The core of our SFM is the basis matrix which can be used to reconstruct 3D face shapes, and the basic matrix is learned by adopting a two-stage training approach where 3D and 2D training data are used in the first and second stages, respectively. To resolve the distribution mismatch, we design a novel loss to make the shape parameters have a hyperspherical latent space. Extensive experiments show that SFM has high representation ability and shape parameter space's clustering performance. Moreover, it produces fidelity face shapes, and the shapes are consistent in challenging conditions in monocular face reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 3D 可变形模型 (3DMM) 是面部形状和外观的生成模型。然而，传统3DMM的形状参数满足多元高斯分布，而身份嵌入满足超球面分布，这种冲突使得人脸重建模型很难同时保持忠实性和形状一致性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了球面模型（SFM），这是一种用于单目面部重建的新型 3DMM，它可以同时保持形状保真度和身份一致性。我们的SFM的核心是可用于重建3D人脸形状的基础矩阵，并且采用两阶段训练方法来学习基础矩阵，其中第一阶段和第二阶段分别使用3D和2D训练数据。为了解决分布不匹配的问题，我们设计了一种新颖的损失，使形状参数具有超球形潜在空间。大量实验表明，SFM具有较高的表示能力和形状参数空间的聚类性能。此外，它可以产生保真度的面部形状，并且在单眼面部重建的挑战性条件下形状保持一致。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Sphere Face Model (SFM)的新型3D可变形模型，用于单目人脸重建，解决了传统模型中形状参数与身份嵌入分布不匹配的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统3DMM的形状参数服从多元高斯分布，而身份嵌入服从超球面分布，这种分布冲突导致难以同时保持形状保真度和身份一致性。
AI.method: 设计了两阶段训练方法：第一阶段使用3D数据学习基础矩阵，第二阶段结合2D数据优化模型；引入新型损失函数使形状参数具备超球面潜在空间。
AI.result: SFM在表示能力、形状参数空间聚类性能及复杂条件下的人脸重建保真度和一致性方面均表现出色。
AI.conclusion: SFM通过解决分布不匹配问题，有效提升了单目人脸重建中形状保真与身份一致性的平衡能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Sphere Face Model (SFM)的新型3D可变形模型，用于单目人脸重建，解决了传统模型中形状参数与身份嵌入分布不匹配的问题。
ai_content.motivation: 传统3DMM的形状参数服从多元高斯分布，而身份嵌入服从超球面分布，这种分布冲突导致难以同时保持形状保真度和身份一致性。

search_text: Sphere Face Model:A 3D Morphable Model with Hypersphere Manifold Latent Space 球面模型：具有超球面流形潜在空间的3D可变形模型 3D Morphable Models (3DMMs) are generative models for face shape and appearance. However, the shape parameters of traditional 3DMMs satisfy the multivariate Gaussian distribution while the identity embeddings satisfy the hypersphere distribution, and this conflict makes it challenging for face reconstruction models to preserve the faithfulness and the shape consistency simultaneously. To address this issue, we propose the Sphere Face Model(SFM), a novel 3DMM for monocular face reconstruction, which can preserve both shape fidelity and identity consistency. The core of our SFM is the basis matrix which can be used to reconstruct 3D face shapes, and the basic matrix is learned by adopting a two-stage training approach where 3D and 2D training data are used in the first and second stages, respectively. To resolve the distribution mismatch, we design a novel loss to make the shape parameters have a hyperspherical latent space. Extensive experiments show that SFM has high representation ability and shape parameter space's clustering performance. Moreover, it produces fidelity face shapes, and the shapes are consistent in challenging conditions in monocular face reconstruction. 3D 可变形模型 (3DMM) 是面部形状和外观的生成模型。然而，传统3DMM的形状参数满足多元高斯分布，而身份嵌入满足超球面分布，这种冲突使得人脸重建模型很难同时保持忠实性和形状一致性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了球面模型（SFM），这是一种用于单目面部重建的新型 3DMM，它可以同时保持形状保真度和身份一致性。我们的SFM的核心是可用于重建3D人脸形状的基础矩阵，并且采用两阶段训练方法来学习基础矩阵，其中第一阶段和第二阶段分别使用3D和2D训练数据。为了解决分布不匹配的问题，我们设计了一种新颖的损失，使形状参数具有超球形潜在空间。大量实验表明，SFM具有较高的表示能力和形状参数空间的聚类性能。此外，它可以产生保真度的面部形状，并且在单眼面部重建的挑战性条件下形状保持一致。 本文提出了一种名为Sphere Face Model (SFM)的新型3D可变形模型，用于单目人脸重建，解决了传统模型中形状参数与身份嵌入分布不匹配的问题。 Diqiong Jiang,Yiwei Jin,Fanglue Zhang,Zhe Zhu,Yun Zhang,Ruofeng Tong,Min Tang cs.CV

authors_text: Tian-Jing Zhang,Liang-Jian Deng,Ting-Zhu Huang,Jocelyn Chanussot,Gemine Vivone
title: A Triple-Double Convolutional Neural Network for Panchromatic Sharpening
title_zh: 用于全色锐化的三重卷积神经网络
abstract: Pansharpening refers to the fusion of a panchromatic image with a high spatial resolution and a multispectral image with a low spatial resolution, aiming to obtain a high spatial resolution multispectral image. In this paper, we propose a novel deep neural network architecture with level-domain based loss function for pansharpening by taking into account the following double-type structures, \emph{i.e.,} double-level, double-branch, and double-direction, called as triple-double network (TDNet). By using the structure of TDNet, the spatial details of the panchromatic image can be fully exploited and utilized to progressively inject into the low spatial resolution multispectral image, thus yielding the high spatial resolution output. The specific network design is motivated by the physical formula of the traditional multi-resolution analysis (MRA) methods. Hence, an effective MRA fusion module is also integrated into the TDNet. Besides, we adopt a few ResNet blocks and some multi-scale convolution kernels to deepen and widen the network to effectively enhance the feature extraction and the robustness of the proposed TDNet. Extensive experiments on reduced- and full-resolution datasets acquired by WorldView-3, QuickBird, and GaoFen-2 sensors demonstrate the superiority of the proposed TDNet compared with some recent state-of-the-art pansharpening approaches. An ablation study has also corroborated the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
summary: Pansharpening refers to the fusion of a panchromatic image with a high spatial resolution and a multispectral image with a low spatial resolution, aiming to obtain a high spatial resolution multispectral image. In this paper, we propose a novel deep neural network architecture with level-domain based loss function for pansharpening by taking into account the following double-type structures, \emph{i.e.,} double-level, double-branch, and double-direction, called as triple-double network (TDNet). By using the structure of TDNet, the spatial details of the panchromatic image can be fully exploited and utilized to progressively inject into the low spatial resolution multispectral image, thus yielding the high spatial resolution output. The specific network design is motivated by the physical formula of the traditional multi-resolution analysis (MRA) methods. Hence, an effective MRA fusion module is also integrated into the TDNet. Besides, we adopt a few ResNet blocks and some multi-scale convolution kernels to deepen and widen the network to effectively enhance the feature extraction and the robustness of the proposed TDNet. Extensive experiments on reduced- and full-resolution datasets acquired by WorldView-3, QuickBird, and GaoFen-2 sensors demonstrate the superiority of the proposed TDNet compared with some recent state-of-the-art pansharpening approaches. An ablation study has also corroborated the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 全色锐化是指将高空间分辨率的全色图像与低空间分辨率的多光谱图像进行融合，旨在获得高空间分辨率的多光谱图像。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的深度神经网络架构，其具有基于水平域的损失函数，用于全色锐化，考虑到以下双类型结构，即双水平、双分支和双方向，称为三双网络（TDNet）。利用TDNet的结构，可以充分利用全色图像的空间细节，逐步注入低空间分辨率的多光谱图像，从而产生高空间分辨率的输出。具体的网络设计受到传统多分辨率分析（MRA）方法的物理公式的启发。因此，TDNet 中也集成了有效的 MRA 融合模块。此外，我们采用一些ResNet块和一些多尺度卷积核来加深和加宽网络，以有效增强所提出的TDNet的特征提取和鲁棒性。对 WorldView-3、QuickBird 和 GauFen-2 传感器获取的降分辨率和全分辨率数据集进行的大量实验证明，与一些最新的全色锐化方法相比，所提出的 TDNet 具有优越性。消融研究也证实了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TDNet的三重双重卷积神经网络，用于将全色图像与多光谱图像融合，生成高空间分辨率的多光谱图像。
AI.motivation: 传统多分辨率分析方法存在结构单一、细节保留不足的问题，需设计更高效的网络结构以提升融合效果。
AI.method: 构建包含双层级、双分支、双方向结构的TDNet，集成MRA融合模块、ResNet块及多尺度卷积核，通过级联注入全色图像细节实现多光谱图像锐化。
AI.result: 在WorldView-3、QuickBird和GaoFen-2数据集上优于现有先进方法，消融实验证实各模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: TDNet通过创新网络结构和物理公式驱动的设计，显著提升了全色锐化效果，为遥感图像融合提供新思路。

title: SemanticStyleGAN: Learning Compositional Generative Priors for Controllable Image Synthesis and Editing
title_zh: SemanticStyleGAN：学习组合生成先验以实现可控图像合成和编辑
comment: Camera-ready for CVPR 2022. Project page at https://SemanticStyleGAN.github.io
comments: Camera-ready for CVPR 2022. Project page at https://SemanticStyleGAN.github.io
abstract: Recent studies have shown that StyleGANs provide promising prior models for downstream tasks on image synthesis and editing. However, since the latent codes of StyleGANs are designed to control global styles, it is hard to achieve a fine-grained control over synthesized images. We present SemanticStyleGAN, where a generator is trained to model local semantic parts separately and synthesizes images in a compositional way. The structure and texture of different local parts are controlled by corresponding latent codes. Experimental results demonstrate that our model provides a strong disentanglement between different spatial areas. When combined with editing methods designed for StyleGANs, it can achieve a more fine-grained control to edit synthesized or real images. The model can also be extended to other domains via transfer learning. Thus, as a generic prior model with built-in disentanglement, it could facilitate the development of GAN-based applications and enable more potential downstream tasks.
summary: Recent studies have shown that StyleGANs provide promising prior models for downstream tasks on image synthesis and editing. However, since the latent codes of StyleGANs are designed to control global styles, it is hard to achieve a fine-grained control over synthesized images. We present SemanticStyleGAN, where a generator is trained to model local semantic parts separately and synthesizes images in a compositional way. The structure and texture of different local parts are controlled by corresponding latent codes. Experimental results demonstrate that our model provides a strong disentanglement between different spatial areas. When combined with editing methods designed for StyleGANs, it can achieve a more fine-grained control to edit synthesized or real images. The model can also be extended to other domains via transfer learning. Thus, as a generic prior model with built-in disentanglement, it could facilitate the development of GAN-based applications and enable more potential downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，StyleGAN 为图像合成和编辑的下游任务提供了有前景的先验模型。然而，由于 StyleGAN 的潜在代码旨在控制全局样式，因此很难实现对合成图像的细粒度控制。我们提出了 SemanticStyleGAN，其中生成器经过训练可以单独建模局部语义部分并以组合方式合成图像。不同局部部分的结构和纹理由相应的潜在代码控制。实验结果表明，我们的模型提供了不同空间区域之间的强烈分离。当与为 StyleGAN 设计的编辑方法结合时，它可以实现更细粒度的控制来编辑合成或真实图像。该模型还可以通过迁移学习扩展到其他领域。因此，作为具有内置解缠结的通用先验模型，它可以促进基于 GAN 的应用程序的开发，并实现更多潜在的下游任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SemanticStyleGAN，通过建模局部语义部分实现图像合成与编辑的细粒度控制。
AI.motivation: StyleGAN虽在图像生成中表现优异，但其潜在代码仅控制全局风格，难以实现对图像局部区域的精细控制。
AI.method: 训练生成器分别建模局部语义部分，以组合方式合成图像，利用对应潜在代码独立控制各区域结构与纹理。
AI.result: 模型在空间区域解耦上表现优异，结合编辑方法可实现更精细的图像编辑，并可通过迁移学习扩展至其他领域。
AI.conclusion: SemanticStyleGAN作为具备内置解耦能力的通用先验模型，可推动基于GAN的应用发展及更多下游任务实现。

When combined with editing methods designed for StyleGANs, it can achieve a more fine-grained control to edit synthesized or real images. Thus, as a generic prior model with built-in disentanglement, it could facilitate the development of GAN-based applications and enable more potential downstream tasks. 最近的研究表明，StyleGAN 为图像合成和编辑的下游任务提供了有前景的先验模型。然而，由于 StyleGAN 的潜在代码旨在控制全局样式，因此很难实现对合成图像的细粒度控制。我们提出了 SemanticStyleGAN，其中生成器经过训练可以单独建模局部语义部分并以组合方式合成图像。不同局部部分的结构和纹理由相应的潜在代码控制。实验结果表明，我们的模型提供了不同空间区域之间的强烈分离。当与为 StyleGAN 设计的编辑方法结合时，它可以实现更细粒度的控制来编辑合成或真实图像。该模型还可以通过迁移学习扩展到其他领域。因此，作为具有内置解缠结的通用先验模型，它可以促进基于 GAN 的应用程序的开发，并实现更多潜在的下游任务。 本文提出SemanticStyleGAN，通过建模局部语义部分实现图像合成与编辑的细粒度控制。 Yichun Shi,Xiao Yang,Yangyue Wan,Xiaohui Shen cs.CV

title: Revisiting $k$-Nearest Neighbor Graph Construction on High-Dimensional Data : Experiments and Analyses
title_zh: 重新审视高维数据上的 $k$-最近邻图构建：实验和分析
abstract: The $k$-nearest neighbor graph (KNNG) on high-dimensional data is a data structure widely used in many applications such as similarity search, dimension reduction and clustering. Due to its increasing popularity, several methods under the same framework have been proposed in the past decade. This framework contains two steps, i.e. building an initial KNNG (denoted as \texttt{INIT}) and then refining it by neighborhood propagation (denoted as \texttt{NBPG}). However, there remain several questions to be answered. First, it lacks a comprehensive experimental comparison among representative solutions in the literature. Second, some recently proposed indexing structures, e.g., SW and HNSW, have not been used or tested for building an initial KNNG. Third, the relationship between the data property and the effectiveness of \texttt{NBPG} is still not clear. To address these issues, we comprehensively compare the representative approaches on real-world high-dimensional data sets to provide practical and insightful suggestions for users. As the first attempt, we take SW and HNSW as the alternatives of \texttt{INIT} in our experiments. Moreover, we investigate the effectiveness of \texttt{NBPG} and find the strong correlation between the huness phenomenon and the performance of \texttt{NBPG}.
summary: The $k$-nearest neighbor graph (KNNG) on high-dimensional data is a data structure widely used in many applications such as similarity search, dimension reduction and clustering. Due to its increasing popularity, several methods under the same framework have been proposed in the past decade. This framework contains two steps, i.e. building an initial KNNG (denoted as \texttt{INIT}) and then refining it by neighborhood propagation (denoted as \texttt{NBPG}). However, there remain several questions to be answered. First, it lacks a comprehensive experimental comparison among representative solutions in the literature. Second, some recently proposed indexing structures, e.g., SW and HNSW, have not been used or tested for building an initial KNNG. Third, the relationship between the data property and the effectiveness of \texttt{NBPG} is still not clear. To address these issues, we comprehensively compare the representative approaches on real-world high-dimensional data sets to provide practical and insightful suggestions for users. As the first attempt, we take SW and HNSW as the alternatives of \texttt{INIT} in our experiments. Moreover, we investigate the effectiveness of \texttt{NBPG} and find the strong correlation between the huness phenomenon and the performance of \texttt{NBPG}.
abstract_zh: 高维数据上的$k$最近邻图（KNNG）是一种广泛应用于相似性搜索、降维和聚类等许多应用中的数据结构。由于其日益流行，在过去十年中在同一框架下提出了多种方法。该框架包含两个步骤，即构建初始 KNNG（表示为 \texttt{INIT}），然后通过邻域传播（表示为 \texttt{NBPG}）对其进行细化。然而，仍有几个问题需要回答。首先，缺乏对文献中代表性解决方案进行全面的实验比较。其次，一些最近提出的索引结构，例如 SW 和 HNSW，尚未用于或测试用于构建初始 KNNG。第三，数据属性与NBPG有效性之间的关系仍不清楚。为了解决这些问题，我们全面比较了现实世界高维数据集上的代表性方法，为用户提供实用且富有洞察力的建议。作为第一次尝试，我们在实验中采用 SW 和 HNSW 作为 \texttt{INIT} 的替代品。此外，我们研究了 \texttt{NBPG} 的有效性，发现 Huness 现象与 \texttt{NBPG} 的性能之间存在很强的相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过实验比较现有高维数据k近邻图（KNNG）构建方法，探索新索引结构在初始图构建中的应用，并分析邻域传播优化效果与数据特性之间的关系。
AI.motivation: 现有KNNG构建方法缺乏系统性实验对比，新型索引结构（如SW/HNSW）未被充分验证，且邻域传播优化（NBPG）效果与数据属性的关系尚不明确。
AI.method: 在真实高维数据集上对比主流方法，首次采用SW/HNSW作为初始图构建方案，通过实验分析NBPG效果与数据特性（如huness现象）的关联性。
AI.result: 实验提供了实用建议，验证了SW/HNSW在INIT阶段的有效性，并发现huness现象与NBPG性能存在强相关性。
AI.conclusion: 系统性实验表明新型索引结构可提升KNNG构建效率，数据特性显著影响优化效果，为实际应用提供了关键参考依据。

authors_text: Dayane Reis,Haoran Geng,Michael Niemier,Xiaobo Sharon Hu
title: IMCRYPTO: An In-Memory Computing Fabric for AES Encryption and Decryption
title_zh: IMCRYPTO：用于 AES 加密和解密的内存计算结构
abstract: This paper proposes IMCRYPTO, an in-memory computing (IMC) fabric for accelerating AES encryption and decryption. IMCRYPTO employs a unified structure to implement encryption and decryption in a single hardware architecture, with combined (Inv)SubBytes and (Inv)MixColumns steps. Because of this step-combination, as well as the high parallelism achieved by multiple units of random-access memory (RAM) and random-access/content-addressable memory (RA/CAM) arrays, IMCRYPTO achieves high throughput encryption and decryption without sacrificing area and power consumption. Additionally, due to the integration of a RISC-V core, IMCRYPTO offers programmability and flexibility. IMCRYPTO improves the throughput per area by a minimum (maximum) of 3.3x (223.1x) when compared to previous ASICs/IMC architectures for AES-128 encryption. Projections show added benefit from emerging technologies of up to 5.3x to the area-delay-power product of IMCRYPTO.
summary: This paper proposes IMCRYPTO, an in-memory computing (IMC) fabric for accelerating AES encryption and decryption. IMCRYPTO employs a unified structure to implement encryption and decryption in a single hardware architecture, with combined (Inv)SubBytes and (Inv)MixColumns steps. Because of this step-combination, as well as the high parallelism achieved by multiple units of random-access memory (RAM) and random-access/content-addressable memory (RA/CAM) arrays, IMCRYPTO achieves high throughput encryption and decryption without sacrificing area and power consumption. Additionally, due to the integration of a RISC-V core, IMCRYPTO offers programmability and flexibility. IMCRYPTO improves the throughput per area by a minimum (maximum) of 3.3x (223.1x) when compared to previous ASICs/IMC architectures for AES-128 encryption. Projections show added benefit from emerging technologies of up to 5.3x to the area-delay-power product of IMCRYPTO.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 IMCRYPTO，一种用于加速 AES 加密和解密的内存计算 (IMC) 结构。 IMCRYPTO 采用统一的结构，在单一硬件架构中实现加密和解密，并结合 (Inv)SubBytes 和 (Inv)MixColumns 步骤。由于这种步骤组合，以及多单元随机存取存储器 (RAM) 和随机存取/内容寻址存储器 (RA/CAM) 阵列实现的高并行性，IMCRYPTO 在不牺牲面积和功耗的情况下实现了高吞吐量加密和解密。此外，由于集成了 RISC-V 内核，IMCRYPTO 提供了可编程性和灵活性。与之前用于 AES-128 加密的 ASIC/IMC 架构相比，IMCRYPTO 将单位面积的吞吐量提高了最小（最大）3.3 倍（223.1 倍）。预测显示新兴技术带来的额外优势高达 IMCRYPTO 面积延迟功率产品的 5.3 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IMCRYPTO，一种用于加速AES加密和解密的内存计算架构。
AI.motivation: 传统ASIC和内存计算架构在AES加密中存在面积、功耗与吞吐量的平衡问题，需提升能效比并保持灵活性。
AI.method: 通过统一结构合并加密与解密步骤，结合多RAM/RA/CAM阵列实现高并行性，并集成RISC-V核心以增强可编程性。
AI.result: 相比现有ASIC/IMC架构，IMCRYPTO在面积效率上提升3.3x至223.1x，新兴技术可进一步优化面积-延迟-功耗乘积达5.3x。
AI.conclusion: IMCRYPTO以高吞吐、低功耗实现AES加密解密，兼具灵活性，为未来内存计算安全应用提供高效方案。

authors_text: Chengyin Xu,Zenghao Chai,Zhengzhuo Xu,Hongjia Li,Qiruyi Zuo,Lingyu Yang,Chun Yuan
title: HHF: Hashing-guided Hinge Function for Deep Hashing Retrieval
title_zh: HHF：用于深度哈希检索的哈希引导铰链函数
abstract: Deep hashing has shown promising performance in large-scale image retrieval. However, latent codes extracted by Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) will inevitably lose semantic information during the binarization process, which damages the retrieval accuracy and makes it challenging. Although many existing approaches perform regularization to alleviate quantization errors, we figure out an incompatible conflict between metric learning and quantization learning. The metric loss penalizes the inter-class distances to push different classes unconstrained far away. Worse still, it tends to map the latent code deviate from ideal binarization point and generate severe ambiguity in the binarization process. Based on the minimum distance of the binary linear code, we creatively propose Hashing-guided Hinge Function (HHF) to avoid such conflict. In detail, the carefully-designed inflection point, which relies on the hash bit length and category numbers, is explicitly adopted to balance the metric term and quantization term. Such a modification prevents the network from falling into local metric optimal minima in deep hashing. Extensive experiments in CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet, and MS-COCO show that HHF consistently outperforms existing techniques, and is robust and flexible to transplant into other methods. Code is available at https://github.com/JerryXu0129/HHF.
summary: Deep hashing has shown promising performance in large-scale image retrieval. However, latent codes extracted by Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) will inevitably lose semantic information during the binarization process, which damages the retrieval accuracy and makes it challenging. The metric loss penalizes the inter-class distances to push different classes unconstrained far away. Worse still, it tends to map the latent code deviate from ideal binarization point and generate severe ambiguity in the binarization process. Based on the minimum distance of the binary linear code, we creatively propose Hashing-guided Hinge Function (HHF) to avoid such conflict. In detail, the carefully-designed inflection point, which relies on the hash bit length and category numbers, is explicitly adopted to balance the metric term and quantization term. Such a modification prevents the network from falling into local metric optimal minima in deep hashing. Extensive experiments in CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet, and MS-COCO show that HHF consistently outperforms existing techniques, and is robust and flexible to transplant into other methods. Code is available at https://github.com/JerryXu0129/HHF.
abstract_zh: 深度哈希在大规模图像检索中表现出了良好的性能。然而，深度神经网络（DNN）提取的潜在代码在二值化过程中不可避免地会丢失语义信息，这会损害检索准确性并使其具有挑战性。尽管许多现有方法通过执行正则化来减轻量化误差，但我们发现度量学习和量化学习之间存在不相容的冲突。度量损失对类间距离进行惩罚，将不同的类推得更远。更糟糕的是，它往往会映射偏离理想二值化点的潜在代码，并在二值化过程中产生严重的歧义。基于二进制线性码的最小距离，我们创造性地提出了哈希引导铰链函数（HHF）来避免这种冲突。具体来说，明确采用依赖于哈希位长度和类别数的精心设计的拐点来平衡度量项和量化项。这样的修改可以防止网络陷入深度哈希中的局部度量最优最小值。 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、ImageNet 和 MS-COCO 中的大量实验表明，HHF 始终优于现有技术，并且稳健且灵活，可以移植到其他方法中。代码可在 https://github.com/JerryXu0129/HHF 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为HHF的哈希引导铰链函数，用于解决深度哈希检索中二值化过程导致的语义信息丢失问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度哈希方法在二值化过程中会丢失语义信息，导致检索精度下降，且度量学习与量化学习存在不兼容冲突。
AI.method: 设计基于二进制线性码最小距离的HHF函数，通过结合哈希位长度和类别数的拐点，平衡度量损失与量化损失。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、ImageNet和MS-COCO数据集上，HHF均优于现有方法，且具有良好的迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: HHF有效缓解了度量学习与量化学习的冲突，提升了深度哈希检索性能，并可灵活应用于其他方法。

search_text: HHF: Hashing-guided Hinge Function for Deep Hashing Retrieval HHF：用于深度哈希检索的哈希引导铰链函数 Deep hashing has shown promising performance in large-scale image retrieval. However, latent codes extracted by Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) will inevitably lose semantic information during the binarization process, which damages the retrieval accuracy and makes it challenging. Although many existing approaches perform regularization to alleviate quantization errors, we figure out an incompatible conflict between metric learning and quantization learning. The metric loss penalizes the inter-class distances to push different classes unconstrained far away. Worse still, it tends to map the latent code deviate from ideal binarization point and generate severe ambiguity in the binarization process. Based on the minimum distance of the binary linear code, we creatively propose Hashing-guided Hinge Function (HHF) to avoid such conflict. In detail, the carefully-designed inflection point, which relies on the hash bit length and category numbers, is explicitly adopted to balance the metric term and quantization term. Such a modification prevents the network from falling into local metric optimal minima in deep hashing. Extensive experiments in CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet, and MS-COCO show that HHF consistently outperforms existing techniques, and is robust and flexible to transplant into other methods. Code is available at https://github.com/JerryXu0129/HHF. 深度哈希在大规模图像检索中表现出了良好的性能。然而，深度神经网络（DNN）提取的潜在代码在二值化过程中不可避免地会丢失语义信息，这会损害检索准确性并使其具有挑战性。尽管许多现有方法通过执行正则化来减轻量化误差，但我们发现度量学习和量化学习之间存在不相容的冲突。度量损失对类间距离进行惩罚，将不同的类推得更远。更糟糕的是，它往往会映射偏离理想二值化点的潜在代码，并在二值化过程中产生严重的歧义。基于二进制线性码的最小距离，我们创造性地提出了哈希引导铰链函数（HHF）来避免这种冲突。具体来说，明确采用依赖于哈希位长度和类别数的精心设计的拐点来平衡度量项和量化项。这样的修改可以防止网络陷入深度哈希中的局部度量最优最小值。 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、ImageNet 和 MS-COCO 中的大量实验表明，HHF 始终优于现有技术，并且稳健且灵活，可以移植到其他方法中。代码可在 https://github.com/JerryXu0129/HHF 获取。 本文提出一种名为HHF的哈希引导铰链函数，用于解决深度哈希检索中二值化过程导致的语义信息丢失问题。 Chengyin Xu,Zenghao Chai,Zhengzhuo Xu,Hongjia Li,Qiruyi Zuo,Lingyu Yang,Chun Yuan cs.CV

authors_text: Hooman Alavizadeh,Julian Jang-Jaccard,Tansu Alpcan,Seyit A. Camtepe
title: A Game-Theoretic Approach for AI-based Botnet Attack Defence
title_zh: 基于人工智能的僵尸网络攻击防御的博弈论方法
abstract: The new generation of botnets leverages Artificial Intelligent (AI) techniques to conceal the identity of botmasters and the attack intention to avoid detection. Unfortunately, there has not been an existing assessment tool capable of evaluating the effectiveness of existing defense strategies against this kind of AI-based botnet attack. In this paper, we propose a sequential game theory model that is capable to analyse the details of the potential strategies botnet attackers and defenders could use to reach Nash Equilibrium (NE). The utility function is computed under the assumption when the attacker launches the maximum number of DDoS attacks with the minimum attack cost while the defender utilises the maximum number of defense strategies with the minimum defense cost. We conduct a numerical analysis based on a various number of defense strategies involved on different (simulated) cloud-band sizes in relation to different attack success rate values. Our experimental results confirm that the success of defense highly depends on the number of defense strategies used according to careful evaluation of attack rates.
summary: The new generation of botnets leverages Artificial Intelligent (AI) techniques to conceal the identity of botmasters and the attack intention to avoid detection. Unfortunately, there has not been an existing assessment tool capable of evaluating the effectiveness of existing defense strategies against this kind of AI-based botnet attack. In this paper, we propose a sequential game theory model that is capable to analyse the details of the potential strategies botnet attackers and defenders could use to reach Nash Equilibrium (NE). The utility function is computed under the assumption when the attacker launches the maximum number of DDoS attacks with the minimum attack cost while the defender utilises the maximum number of defense strategies with the minimum defense cost. We conduct a numerical analysis based on a various number of defense strategies involved on different (simulated) cloud-band sizes in relation to different attack success rate values. Our experimental results confirm that the success of defense highly depends on the number of defense strategies used according to careful evaluation of attack rates.
abstract_zh: 新一代僵尸网络利用人工智能（AI）技术来隐藏僵尸主机的身份和攻击意图，以避免被发现。不幸的是，目前还没有一种评估工具能够评估现有防御策略针对这种基于人工智能的僵尸网络攻击的有效性。在本文中，我们提出了一种顺序博弈论模型，该模型能够分析僵尸网络攻击者和防御者可以用来达到纳什均衡（NE）的潜在策略的细节。效用函数是在假设攻击者以最小的攻击成本发起最大数量的DDoS攻击，而防御者以最小的防御成本使用最大数量的防御策略的情况下计算的。我们根据涉及不同（模拟）云带大小与不同攻击成功率值相关的各种防御策略进行数值分析。我们的实验结果证实，防御的成功很大程度上取决于根据对攻击率的仔细评估而使用的防御策略的数量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于博弈论的方法，用于分析和防御AI驱动的僵尸网络攻击，通过建立序贯博弈模型达到纳什均衡，评估不同防御策略的有效性。
AI.motivation: 新一代僵尸网络利用AI技术隐藏攻击者身份和意图，现有防御策略缺乏有效评估工具，亟需新的分析方法应对AI攻击。
AI.method: 构建序贯博弈模型，设定攻击者与防御者的成本函数，通过数值分析不同防御策略数量与云带规模、攻击成功率的关系验证模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，防御成功率高度依赖防御策略的数量，增加防御策略可有效提升对抗AI僵尸网络攻击的能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于博弈论的防御框架能有效分析AI僵尸网络攻击策略，合理增加防御策略数量是提升防御效果的关键。
