authors_text: Feng Xu,Chuang Zhu,Wenqi Tang,Ying Wang,Yu Zhang,Jie Li,Hongchuan Jiang,Zhongyue Shi,Jun Liu,Mulan Jin
title: Predicting Axillary Lymph Node Metastasis in Early Breast Cancer Using Deep Learning on Primary Tumor Biopsy Slides
title_zh: 利用深度学习对原发性肿瘤活检切片预测早期乳腺癌的腋窝淋巴结转移
comment: Update Table 1 and corresponding descriptions
comments: Update Table 1 and corresponding descriptions
abstract: Objectives: To develop and validate a deep learning (DL)-based primary tumor biopsy signature for predicting axillary lymph node (ALN) metastasis preoperatively in early breast cancer (EBC) patients with clinically negative ALN. Methods: A total of 1,058 EBC patients with pathologically confirmed ALN status were enrolled from May 2010 to August 2020. A DL core-needle biopsy (DL-CNB) model was built on the attention-based multiple instance-learning (AMIL) framework to predict ALN status utilizing the DL features, which were extracted from the cancer areas of digitized whole-slide images (WSIs) of breast CNB specimens annotated by two pathologists. Accuracy, sensitivity, specificity, receiver operating characteristic (ROC) curves, and areas under the ROC curve (AUCs) were analyzed to evaluate our model. Results: The best-performing DL-CNB model with VGG16_BN as the feature extractor achieved an AUC of 0.816 (95% confidence interval (CI): 0.758, 0.865) in predicting positive ALN metastasis in the independent test cohort. Furthermore, our model incorporating the clinical data, which was called DL-CNB+C, yielded the best accuracy of 0.831 (95%CI: 0.775, 0.878), especially for patients younger than 50 years (AUC: 0.918, 95%CI: 0.825, 0.971). The interpretation of DL-CNB model showed that the top signatures most predictive of ALN metastasis were characterized by the nucleus features including density ($p$ = 0.015), circumference ($p$ = 0.009), circularity ($p$ = 0.010), and orientation ($p$ = 0.012). Conclusion: Our study provides a novel DL-based biomarker on primary tumor CNB slides to predict the metastatic status of ALN preoperatively for patients with EBC. The codes and dataset are available at https://github.com/bupt-ai-cz/BALNMP

Conclusion: Our study provides a novel DL-based biomarker on primary tumor CNB slides to predict the metastatic status of ALN preoperatively for patients with EBC. The codes and dataset are available at https://github.com/bupt-ai-cz/BALNMP
abstract_zh: 目的：开发并验证基于深度学习 (DL) 的原发性肿瘤活检特征，用于预测临床 ALN 阴性的早期乳腺癌 (EBC) 患者的术前腋窝淋巴结 (ALN) 转移。方法：从 2010 年 5 月至 2020 年 8 月，共纳入 1,058 例经病理证实 ALN 状态的 EBC 患者。在基于注意力的多实例学习 (AMIL) 框架上构建 DL 核心针活检 (DL-CNB) 模型，利用 DL 特征预测 ALN 状态，这些特征是从由两个注释的乳腺 CNB 标本的数字化全切片图像 (WSI) 的癌症区域中提取的。病理学家。分析准确性、敏感性、特异性、受试者工作特征 (ROC) 曲线和 ROC 曲线下面积 (AUC) 以评估我们的模型。结果：以 VGG16_BN 作为特征提取器的性能最佳的 DL-CNB 模型在预测独立测试队列中的阳性 ALN 转移方面取得了 0.816 的 AUC（95% 置信区间 (CI)：0.758，0.865）。此外，我们的模型结合了临床数据，称为 DL-CNB+C，产生了 0.831 的最佳准确度（95%CI：0.775，0.878），特别是对于 50 岁以下的患者（AUC：0.918，95%CI：0.825，0.971）。 DL-CNB 模型的解释表明，最能预测 ALN 转移的主要特征是细胞核特征，包括密度 ($p$ = 0.015)、周长 ($p$ = 0.009)、圆形度 ($p$ = 0.010) 和方向 ($p$ = 0.012)。结论：我们的研究在原发肿瘤 CNB 玻片上提供了一种基于 DL 的新型生物标志物，用于预测 EBC 患者术前 ALN 的转移状态。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/bupt-ai-cz/BALNMP 获取

AI.tldr: 利用深度学习对早期乳腺癌患者的核心针活检切片进行分析，以预测腋窝淋巴结转移。
AI.motivation: 目前临床无法准确预判早期乳腺癌患者腋窝淋巴结转移状态，需开发非侵入性预测工具辅助决策。
AI.method: 基于注意力机制的多实例学习框架，从数字化全切片图像中提取癌灶区域特征，结合临床数据构建深度学习模型。
AI.result: 独立测试队列中模型AUC达0.816，整合临床数据后总体准确率83.1%，年轻患者亚组AUC高达0.918，核特征（密度、周长等）为关键预测指标。
AI.conclusion: 提出首个基于原发肿瘤活检切片的深度学习生物标志物，可术前预测淋巴结转移状态，代码与数据集已开源。

search_text: Predicting Axillary Lymph Node Metastasis in Early Breast Cancer Using Deep Learning on Primary Tumor Biopsy Slides 利用深度学习对原发性肿瘤活检切片预测早期乳腺癌的腋窝淋巴结转移 Objectives: To develop and validate a deep learning (DL)-based primary tumor biopsy signature for predicting axillary lymph node (ALN) metastasis preoperatively in early breast cancer (EBC) patients with clinically negative ALN. Methods: A total of 1,058 EBC patients with pathologically confirmed ALN status were enrolled from May 2010 to August 2020. A DL core-needle biopsy (DL-CNB) model was built on the attention-based multiple instance-learning (AMIL) framework to predict ALN status utilizing the DL features, which were extracted from the cancer areas of digitized whole-slide images (WSIs) of breast CNB specimens annotated by two pathologists. Accuracy, sensitivity, specificity, receiver operating characteristic (ROC) curves, and areas under the ROC curve (AUCs) were analyzed to evaluate our model. Results: The best-performing DL-CNB model with VGG16_BN as the feature extractor achieved an AUC of 0.816 (95% confidence interval (CI): 0.758, 0.865) in predicting positive ALN metastasis in the independent test cohort. Furthermore, our model incorporating the clinical data, which was called DL-CNB+C, yielded the best accuracy of 0.831 (95%CI: 0.775, 0.878), especially for patients younger than 50 years (AUC: 0.918, 95%CI: 0.825, 0.971). The interpretation of DL-CNB model showed that the top signatures most predictive of ALN metastasis were characterized by the nucleus features including density ($p$ = 0.015), circumference ($p$ = 0.009), circularity ($p$ = 0.010), and orientation ($p$ = 0.012). Conclusion: Our study provides a novel DL-based biomarker on primary tumor CNB slides to predict the metastatic status of ALN preoperatively for patients with EBC. The codes and dataset are available at https://github.com/bupt-ai-cz/BALNMP 目的：开发并验证基于深度学习 (DL) 的原发性肿瘤活检特征，用于预测临床 ALN 阴性的早期乳腺癌 (EBC) 患者的术前腋窝淋巴结 (ALN) 转移。方法：从 2010 年 5 月至 2020 年 8 月，共纳入 1,058 例经病理证实 ALN 状态的 EBC 患者。在基于注意力的多实例学习 (AMIL) 框架上构建 DL 核心针活检 (DL-CNB) 模型，利用 DL 特征预测 ALN 状态，这些特征是从由两个注释的乳腺 CNB 标本的数字化全切片图像 (WSI) 的癌症区域中提取的。病理学家。分析准确性、敏感性、特异性、受试者工作特征 (ROC) 曲线和 ROC 曲线下面积 (AUC) 以评估我们的模型。结果：以 VGG16_BN 作为特征提取器的性能最佳的 DL-CNB 模型在预测独立测试队列中的阳性 ALN 转移方面取得了 0.816 的 AUC（95% 置信区间 (CI)：0.758，0.865）。此外，我们的模型结合了临床数据，称为 DL-CNB+C，产生了 0.831 的最佳准确度（95%CI：0.775，0.878），特别是对于 50 岁以下的患者（AUC：0.918，95%CI：0.825，0.971）。 DL-CNB 模型的解释表明，最能预测 ALN 转移的主要特征是细胞核特征，包括密度 ($p$ = 0.015)、周长 ($p$ = 0.009)、圆形度 ($p$ = 0.010) 和方向 ($p$ = 0.012)。结论：我们的研究在原发肿瘤 CNB 玻片上提供了一种基于 DL 的新型生物标志物，用于预测 EBC 患者术前 ALN 的转移状态。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/bupt-ai-cz/BALNMP 获取 利用深度学习对早期乳腺癌患者的核心针活检切片进行分析，以预测腋窝淋巴结转移。 Feng Xu,Chuang Zhu,Wenqi Tang,Ying Wang,Yu Zhang,Jie Li,Hongchuan Jiang,Zhongyue Shi,Jun Liu,Mulan Jin eess.IV,cs.CV,physics.med-ph
